Peter — I hope that you had a nice Thanksgiving with friends and family. I don’t like having to do this, but in a moment, I have to ask you for a small contribution to my Democratic campaign.

[**But before I do, I want to make sure that I thank a few people who have recently stepped up and made a donation to our campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12364400/127136996/10128690?refcode=20191129-EM-E1-DF-T0F1S1C1-AC&amount=25&recurring=1&refcode2=e16ecfc3-2f13-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTZlY2ZjMy0yZjEzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PTeu7UGnCjslkJEcv2K-J6_WemKKAFL6P4ZmshPg6aI=) _Mark S. from Bakersfield donated $3. Thank you so much, Mark._

_Judith H. from Ridgecrest chipped in $25. I appreciate it, Judith._

_Samuel H. from Tehachapi contributed $5. It means a lot, Samuel._ [I mean it when I say this, Peter: Our campaign would collapse without grassroots donations.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12364401/127136997/10128690?refcode=20191129-EM-E1-DF-T0F1S1C1-AC&amount=25&recurring=1&refcode2=e16ecfc3-2f13-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTZlY2ZjMy0yZjEzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PTeu7UGnCjslkJEcv2K-J6_WemKKAFL6P4ZmshPg6aI=)

Listen, I don’t come from a rich, well-connected family. I don’t have any special interest mega-donors on speed-dial. _And that’s fine by me!_

I count on REAL people like you, and Mark and Judith and Samuel, to step up when you can to help me defeat Trump’s biggest enabler in the House, Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy. And I’m very proud of the campaign we’re running together, Peter.

[**Please, if you can afford it today, contribute $3, $25, or more. We need to raise at least $4,750 in the next 48 hours to reach our November fundraising goal. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12364402/127136998/10128690?refcode=20191129-EM-E1-DF-T0F1S1C1-AC&amount=25&recurring=1&refcode2=e16ecfc3-2f13-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTZlY2ZjMy0yZjEzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PTeu7UGnCjslkJEcv2K-J6_WemKKAFL6P4ZmshPg6aI=) | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12364403/127136999/10128690?refcode=20191129-EM-E1-DF-T0F1S1C1-AC&amount=5&recurring=1&refcode2=e16ecfc3-2f13-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTZlY2ZjMy0yZjEzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PTeu7UGnCjslkJEcv2K-J6_WemKKAFL6P4ZmshPg6aI=)

Democrat Kim Mangone is a proud United States Air Force veteran and working single mom. She is running to defeat President Trump's righthand man in the House of Representatives: Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy. McCarthy spearheaded the House vote in 2017 to fully REPEAL the Affordable Care Act under Trump's direction. McCarthy is now backed by powerful special interests who will do _anything_ to re-elect him. But Kim is ready to put the people of this district first again, by fighting for affordable health care, defending Social Security from devastating cuts, and standing up for our veterans.

Look, it really doesn't matter whether you're still unsure about which candidate to support for the general election.

The important thing to know is that John's ideas and vision for America aren't the same as the ones you heard laid out in the last debate.

John believes in an America where the private and public sectors work together to create a more secure and prosperous America.

He believes in a future where we can provide universal health coverage while allowing others to stay on their private plans.

He believes that America can still move forward and tackle our problems by working together -- not pushing others away.

**If you agree, we need your grassroots support. Please chip in today to get John to the next debates:**

**[https://go.johndelaney.com/Donate](https://go.johndelaney.?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkd_fr_q42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.29_e1_jkd_eom_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=1,5,35,50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Silver Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=10+-+httpsgojohndelaneycomDonate&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.11.29_e1_jkd_eom_all&source=em_fr_2019.11.29_e1_jkd_eom_all")**

Thanks for your support.
_\- Delaney 2020_

name: Cory Booker
subject: I'm proud to be an underdog in this fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
I don't have billions in personal wealth to spend on my candidacy. And our campaign won't be able to spend that kind of money on television ads.
| | |
---
| Friend, If you've turned on your TV over the past couple of days, chances are you saw an ad from the most recent addition to this race, Michael Bloomberg. That's because he's spending _$30 million on television ads ... **just this week.**_ **Will you chip in to help us compete with the big money entering the race? Anything you give will get us closer to reaching our $1.5 million end-of-month goal.** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191129_CB_20191129-fr-CB-MB-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191129_CB_20191129-fr-CB-MB-actives_actives_express100&amount=100&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191129_CB_20191129-fr-CB-MB-actives_actives_expressother&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---

I don't have billions in personal wealth to spend on my candidacy. And our campaign won't be able to spend that kind of money on television ads anytime soon.
But I'm not too worried, because what we have is something better. We have supporters like you -- supporters who stand by our common belief that when we join together and work together, we will rise together, and who never fail to step up when we need it most.
Well friend, now is one of those times. We need to raise $1.5 million by the end of the month to execute our own advertising program to meet the DNC's polling requirement and secure our spot on the December debate stage. [**Can you help?**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191129_CB_20191129-fr-CB-MB-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
Thanks for having my back,
Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191129_CB_20191129-fr-CB-MB-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dcc/5fca0d19/78813fe5/291ca55a/534610130/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dcc/5fca0d19/78813fe5/291ca559/534610130/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dcc/5fca0d19/78813fe5/291ca558/534610130/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dcc/5fca0d19/78813fe5/291ca5a7/534610130/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dcc/5fca0d19/78813fe5/291ca5a6/534610130/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dcc/5fca0d19/78813fe5/291ca55a/534610130/VEsHAQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Team Tina
subject: We don't want to worry Tina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Tina has been hard at work in the Senate, and it's a lot to juggle on top of running a re-election campaign in a state Donald Trump lost by just 1.5 points in 2016. Can you help?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191129-reason?refcode=em191129-reason&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Team --

Tina has been hard at work in the Senate. She has fought for legislation to lower the cost of prescription drugs. She has opposed Trump's attacks on women's health and reproductive freedom. And she has helped pass a bipartisan bill to support Minnesota's farmers and ranchers.

**The reason we're telling you this is because it's a lot to juggle on top of running a re-election campaign in a state Donald Trump lost by just 1.5 points in 2016.**

And the best way we can keep her focused on doing her job and talking with Minnesota voters out on the campaign trail would be by hitting our fundraising goal for November -- not making her worry every time we fall behind.

**So, we're asking: can you chip in $10 or more to help us hit this month's goal before tomorrow's midnight deadline? It would mean so much to Tina and our team if you stepped up today, and it would take a lot off of her plate.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191129-reason?refcode=em191129-reason&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")
---
| | [$25 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191129-reason?refcode=em191129-reason&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=25")

| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191129-reason?refcode=em191129-reason&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=50")

-- Team Tina

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: I’m proud to stand with President Trump
body:
Instead of working for the American people, House Democrats are wasting time on a partisan impeachment sham to undo President Trump's 2016 victory.

Peter,

Too many politicians talk a big game back home, but don’t get the job done in Washington. We need more conservative fighters in the United States Senate willing to stop illegal immigration.

That’s why I’m proud to stand with President Trump to Build the Wall and ban sanctuary cities. If you’re with me, chip-in $10 to our campaign and we’ll send you our Build the Wall bumper sticker! [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/buildthewall-bumper-sticker?amount=10&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=HDS]

Putting an end to illegal immigration begins with securing our southern border. I will always stand up for the rule of law and support our border patrol agents.

Tell the Democrats where you stand. Get your Build the Wall bumper sticker today! [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/buildthewall-bumper-sticker?amount=10&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=HDS]

Thank you for your support.

Bill Hagerty

Candidate for U.S. Senate (R-TN)

DONATE NOW [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/buildthewall-bumper-sticker?amount=10&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=HDS] Team Hagerty

name: Senator Mike Braun
subject: Impeachment thoughts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
---
| | Peter, We have seen and heard a lot from Democrats in Washington these past few weeks when it comes to President Trump, Ukraine, and impeachment. I want to set the record straight with you and let you know where I stand. **To me, when you drill down into the question that was asked of every witness, was there an impeachable moment, not a single one said yes.** Nothing has risen to that level of crimes necessary for Congress to impeach a president. This entire process is just another symptom of a broken Washington. We have two sides, entrenched in their opinions with few people working for you, the American people. We've got an election coming up in less than a year now.**I will leave impeachment in the hands of the American people.** They will be the final deciding factor on whether or not President Trump deserves a second term, not the radicals in the Democrat party running the show in the House. **President Trump is delivering on his promises.** He has withdrawn the United States from the Paris Climate Agreement, stood up to China and their unfair trade practices, and is delivering jobs to Hoosiers across the state. **The impeachment sham is nothing more than a hoax and a distraction from a party that is out of touch with Americans and has run out of real ideas to solve our nation’s problems.** Over the next year, you will hear from me about what I think will solve our nation’s troubles. I will continue to fight for all Hoosiers as your senator. Delivering jobs and economic opportunities for you is my number one priority. I welcome your thoughts on how we can deliver for you during my term. Thank you and have a blessed Thanksgiving. Senator Mike Braun [](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdkyiujd-kujulhlke-y/) |
---|---|---

[mikebraunforindiana.com](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdkyiujd-kujulhlke-j/)

[](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdkyiujd-kujulhlke-t/) [](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdkyiujd-kujulhlke-i/) [](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdkyiujd-kujulhlke-d/)

You're receiving this email because you subscribed via our [web site](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdkyiujd-kujulhlke-h/), or donated to our campaign
but you may [unsubscribe](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-u-jdkyiujd-kujulhlke-r/) if you're no longer interested.

Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana

name: Karl Rove
subject: Final Notice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
This is my final notice. The November end-of-month deadline is almost here, and Senate Republicans need you to join the fight NOW.
Peter,

_President Trump emailed.

Newt Gingrich emailed.

**Republican leaders emailed you over 10 times!**

**NOW, I 'm following up.**_

This is my final notice. The end of month deadline is **today** , and your donation is still missing. The Republican Senate Majority needs your help to reach their goal. That GOP majority is the last line of defense for the President and his agenda. [**Make a 2x-matched donation now to stop a Liberal takeover!**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53634281:sbIxBLvNu:m:1:1155937413:74509112751D8D8D2AEBA1F3881AE5DB:r)

Democrats have broken fundraising records in building a massive war chest. Liberal special interests and dark money groups are arming Democrats with all the resources they need to attack Republicans in key battleground states. [**Don 't let this assault go unanswered - donate now to make 2x the impact before the deadline passes!**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53634282:sbIxBLvNu:m:1:1155937413:74509112751D8D8D2AEBA1F3881AE5DB:r)

Chuck Schumer has handpicked far-left Democratic candidates, and with the backing of the Liberal establishment and media, they're trying to flip the Senate and wipe out President Trump's agenda. This is urgent. [**Please chip in now and help Senate Republicans reach their end-of-month goal!**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53634283:sbIxBLvNu:m:1:1155937413:74509112751D8D8D2AEBA1F3881AE5DB:r)

The Democratic Party agenda is the most extreme I've seen since George McGovern and maybe Michael Dukakis. The Green New Deal, government-controlled health care, abolishing the Electoral College, decriminalizing illegally crossing the border - **the bottom line is their agenda would be a disaster for America!** [**Stop this far-Left agenda - make a 2x-matched donation and help us reach our end-of-month goal!**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53634284:sbIxBLvNu:m:1:1155937413:74509112751D8D8D2AEBA1F3881AE5DB:r)

Thank you for answering the call. Republicans need you in this fight.

Karl Rove

**[**DONATE NOW**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53634285:sbIxBLvNu:m:1:1155937413:74509112751D8D8D2AEBA1F3881AE5DB:r)**

clean_body: I’m headed to the game... and I’m hoping for some big offensive play to make this match happen! >> | | | | | | | Peter, Today's the day... Iron Bowl 2019! 🏈 I'm headed to the game, and looking forward to a great afternoon. I've coached in ten Iron Bowls myself, and know just how fired up these teams are for the match-up. I wrote you about this, and so did my campaign team (see below). I 'm going to 4X MATCH all contributions, up to $10,000, if the boys put up 60 points or more combined! This is our final call on this opportunity. "Tap or click here to rush a donation" , and let's root for some big offensive play! \- Coach From: Team Tuberville To: Tommy Tuberville Date: Friday, November 29, 2019 5:00PM Subject: Coach's 4X MATCH! Must-read id:2019-11-20-14:35:37:258t | | | | Tommy, Coach sent you a message on this the other day. It's HUGE news. The Iron Bowl is coming up this Saturday... and if the Tide and the Tigers combine for 60 points or more, Coach is going to 4X MATCH all contribution this week, up to $10,000! Don't miss this chance to make a big impact as we close out November. Coach is in this race to win, and he needs EVERY conservative on board. "Chip in a $10, $25, $50, or $100 special Iron Bowl contribution" , or any other amount, and if there are 60 points or more Coach will QUADRUPLE MATCH your support! "Chip in $10 - $40 Impact with Match!" "Chip in $25 - $100 Impact with Match!" "Chip in $50 - $200 Impact with Match!" "Chip in $100 - $400 Impact with Match!" Coach can't wait for the big game. It's a fierce rivalry, and he knows these squads are going to leave it all on the field. The Iron Bowl has a special place in his heart too. He 's one of only two Auburn coaches to win more than half of their Iron Bowls, with a 7-3 record! Coach is the proven winner we need to defeat liberal Doug Jones and the national Democrat campaign machine in 2020. But he needs your help. "Make a donation today HERE"... don't miss this opportunity to have Coach personally 4X match your financial support! \- Team Tuberville Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc. | | | This email was sent by: Tuberville for Senate 210 Virginia Avenue, Auburn, AL, 36830 United States

This is it – our end-of-month fundraising deadline is now JUST HOURS away, at midnight tonight. I’m writing to ask for your help.
Peter,

**[Will you chip in $3, $5, $10, or $25 now to help us reach our goal?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c3d5cbc2bd1a38a3/467b17258cc1101ec3d6b838967d376c/33153)**

If you’ve already responded over the last week, thank you. Conservatives are stepping up in big numbers to help me take on liberal extremist Jeanne Shaheen, and **we’re now less than $1,000 away from our November end-of-month fundraising target.**

Please help put us over the top, Peter. We ALL have a role to play in the fight to take back New Hampshire and stand with President Trump to Keep America Great!

\- Corky id:2019-11-20-14:35:49:727t | |

|

We really need your help, folks. We’re going over our first month’s fundraising numbers with Charles first thing tomorrow to make sure we have the resources to travel the Commonwealth and listen to regular folks share their priorities. [_**But we want to do this right. Right now, we’re $4,031 short of where we need to be. Will you chip in $10 or more before midnight tonight? Charles has seen firsthand the harm corrupt politicians like McConnell have caused the Commonwealth. But he’s worked with communities on the ground and at every level of government to find solutions to the problems McConnell ignores. Charles has a record that speaks for itself.
Millionaires like McConnell could probably get a slate of corporate donors to write checks for 20 times our goal in five minutes. That’s the difference between our movement and his campaign: We’re doing this to elevate the voices of working people. McConnell is in this for his own wallet.
[_**So we’re asking you one more time: Will you chip in $10 or more before midnight tonight to close this $4,031 gap? Grassroots donors like you power this movement.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12374262/127271112/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191130_a2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDUyMDM3NC03YzEzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WnuHWcnoaYHjt5s8j5Er4Ek0wC3-Jig3NGOih4bRb18=)
Together, we’re going to bring jobs back to Kentucky, make sure every single person has access to health care, and lift up every voice that has been ignored.
Thank you for helping us set the foundation for our movement.
Talk to you soon,
Team Charles
**[Donate Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12374263/127271113/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191130_m&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDUyMDM3NC03YzEzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WnuHWcnoaYHjt5s8j5Er4Ek0wC3-Jig3NGOih4bRb18=)** **[Donate Once](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12374264/127271114/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191130_o&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDUyMDM3NC03YzEzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WnuHWcnoaYHjt5s8j5Er4Ek0wC3-Jig3NGOih4bRb18=)** Contributions to CBEC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
---
While Mitch McConnell gets richer, our state gets poorer. As he gains power in Washington, our communities lose it in Kentucky. That’s why Charles Booker is seriously considering running for the U.S. Senate. But he wants to do this right. As he keeps traveling the state to have real conversations with real people, [_**will you donate to his exploratory committee?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12374265/127271115/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191130_footer&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDUyMDM3NC03YzEzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WnuHWcnoaYHjt5s8j5Er4Ek0wC3-Jig3NGOih4bRb18=)

subject: Don’t forget to celebrate #SmallBusinessSaturday!

body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/59YtQpuxfs_aWjoFupbY0FcTWnPJEFJz7_ordbWsGfQ=/geQnTeVX3i8RNMPQ5WCbALrquYGcbKeb6kqxswzlNiE=?recurring=auto&amount=22&refcode=20191130email)

Hey team, As you may know, today is Small Business Saturday! It's a day devoted to shopping with intention -- to make a positive impact for small business owners, contribute to local economies, and promote community. **While you 're making your holiday purchases, I encourage you to make an effort to shop at small businesses.** I know small businesses are crucial to our communities. That's why I'm such a big proponent of shopping at small businesses! **Small businesses can bolster a local community and are the backbone of our nation 's economy. That's why I'll fight in Congress to ensure small businesses can grow and thrive. **This includes supporting entrepreneurship, especially for women and minorities, by facilitating access to early state capital, small business loans, and funding programs that invest in innovative businesses. **So I encourage you to do your part today, if you are able, and Shop Small!** In gratitude,
Sri Preston Kulkarni | | **[DONATE NOW ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/59YtQpuxfs_aWjoFupbY0FcTWnPJEFJz7_ordbWsGfQ=/geQnTeVX3i8RNMPQ5WCbALrquYGcbKeb6kqxswzlNiE=?recurring=auto&amount=22&refcode=20191130email)**

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Do you believe in us?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter --

What’s motivating me to run for Congress is so much more than beating Steve King.

Yes, this campaign is about getting Steve King’s hateful rhetoric and selfish ideology out of Congress. But more than that, people across Iowa’s 4th district care about the kind of representative they send to Washington in his place.

I’ve heard from family farmers who are forced to take on second jobs in order to make ends meet. I’ve talked to people worried about the sky-high cost of healthcare and prescription drugs. And time and again, Iowans have told me that they no longer want to feel forgotten by career politicians.

I’m fed up with how rural communities have been left behind. I will be a different type of Congressman -- one who will listen to the people, one who will always show up. We have a real shot at this, but it will take a huge grassroots movement in order to win.

**[Peter, it won’t be easy, but together we can beat Steve King. Chip in $5 or more before tonight’s fundraising deadline, and we’ll be able to make this happen. Every dollar counts toward our goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12379432/127313638/315283610?refcode=em19_191130_eom3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzRjMTJhYS04YzEzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zA4MRawCrFdxv2ZPM6OQgUSO7Im2TsLYvAzS1Fg6o5Y=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12379433/127313639/315283610?refcode=em19_191130_eom3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzRjMTJhYS04YzEzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zA4MRawCrFdxv2ZPM6OQgUSO7Im2TsLYvAzS1Fg6o5Y=)
This will be an uphill battle, and we need a lot of resources to campaign hard in all 39 counties of the 4th district. We’re still behind where we need to be for tonight’s deadline, and it’s so important that we reach our goal.

But I believe in the people of this district. Working together, we can win back our seat at the table. As this campaign has grown, I’m so grateful to see so many people believe in us.

**[Please, if you believe we can do this, can you chip in whatever you can before tonight’s end-of-month deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12379434/127313640/315283610?refcode=em19_191130_eom3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzRjMTJhYS04YzEzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zA4MRawCrFdxv2ZPM6OQgUSO7Im2TsLYvAzS1Fg6o5Y=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12379435/127313641/315283610?refcode=em19_191130_eom3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzRjMTJhYS04YzEzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zA4MRawCrFdxv2ZPM6OQgUSO7Im2TsLYvAzS1Fg6o5Y=)
This is the first deadline that’s less than a year from the election. That means that what we can accomplish now is the foundation for the long year ahead. Thank you for being on this team.

Standing Tall for All,

\-- J.D. Scholten
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12379436/127313642/315283610?refcode=em19_191130_eom3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzRjMTJhYS04YzEzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zA4MRawCrFdxv2ZPM6OQgUSO7Im2TsLYvAzS1Fg6o5Y=)

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Have questions, concerns, or ideas? Simply reply to this email — we love hearing from supporters! You can also connect with the campaign on social media: Like us on [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12379437/127313643/-579313244?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzRjMTJhYS04YzEzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zA4MRawCrFdxv2ZPM6OQgUSO7Im2TsLYvAzS1Fg6o5Y=&emci=4f71b3dd-a50f-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=c74c12aa-8c13-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013) or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12379438/127313644/-1912497674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzRjMTJhYS04YzEzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zA4MRawCrFdxv2ZPM6OQgUSO7Im2TsLYvAzS1Fg6o5Y=&emci=4f71b3dd-a50f-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=c74c12aa-8c13-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013). Email is one of the most important ways we stay in touch with supporters like you, so we'd hate to see you go; but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/4f71b3dd-a50f-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68/c74c12aa-8c13-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzRjMTJhYS04YzEzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zA4MRawCrFdxv2ZPM6OQgUSO7Im2TsLYvAzS1Fg6o5Y=&id=109918160&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) from Scholten4Iowa emails.

| Dear Patriot,
I do not want to take too much of your time, but I felt it was important to send you an update on the ongoing partisan impeachment inquiry that is eroding our democratic process.
The Democrat's narrative continues to fall short testimony after testimony for the simple reason that President Donald Trump did nothing wrong.
However, Representative Adam Schiff and his allies, including Rep. Susan Wild, continue to spread lies and fake news with the hope of getting our democratically elected President impeached.
It is clear what is happening. Democrats are afraid of losing in 2020. These liberal elites know that the American people will double down on their support for President Trump and now see no other option but to take matters into their own hands and push a one-sided, partisan impeachment inquiry to stop President Trump from being re-elected in 2020!.

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, I do not want to take too much of your time, but I felt it was important to send you an update on the ongoing partisan impeachment inquiry that is eroding our democratic process. The Democrat's narrative continues to fall short testimony after testimony for the simple reason that President Donald Trump did nothing wrong. However, Representative Adam Schiff and his allies, including Rep. Susan Wild, continue to spread lies and fake news with the hope of getting our democratically elected President impeached. It is clear what is happening. Democrats are afraid of losing in 2020. These liberal elites know that the American people will double down on their support for President Trump and now see no other option but to take matters into their own hands and push a one-sided, partisan impeachment inquiry to stop President Trump from being re-elected in 2020!. Fellow Patriot == | | | == | We need American citizens across the country to chip in on this fight. A small donation goes a long way in helping not only myself and hundreds of other Republicans but in preserving the values of this country that we hold so dear. Please, donate today and together we will beat in Rep. Susan Wild in 2020 and continue President Trump's effort in making America the most prosperous country in modern times. | | | == | I look forward to the opportunity to meet you while on the campaign trail. | For Freedom, | | Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07 ==~ Have you seen Susan Wild's supporters urging her to impeach President Trump? We need to fight back in 2020 to preserve our democracy! == | | | == | == == | PAID FOR BY BROWNING FOR CONGRESS | | Dean Browning | 2432 W. name: Greg Stanton
subject: Whether you're a Sun Devil or a Wildcat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Tonight, I'll be joining thousands of Arizonans across the state in watching the Territorial Cup football game between the University of Arizona Wildcats and the Arizona State University Sun Devils.

**This rivalry trophy hearkens back to before Arizona was even a state and is a symbolic representation of how the people of Arizona are united even in our differences.**

And whether those differences are based on our preferred college football teams, our backgrounds, our incomes, or even our political leanings, we can all come together as Arizonans to celebrate this beautiful state.

I've been reflecting a lot on the recall campaign that was levied against me earlier this month and I feel like it just goes so much against this spirit of who we are here in Arizona.

_Accordingly, I 'm fighting this recall campaign, not because I am worried about my own position, but because I know these recall campaigns that are meant to exploit our differences are antithetical to who we are in Arizona._

And I truly believe we cannot let this become the new norm in our great state!

**[Will you _RUSH_ a contribution today before our campaign's midnight deadline to support our RECALL RAPID RESPONSE FUND? -- Chip In »](https://act.myngp.com/el/vaqPfWRSv2VpiNoOjFVLjgOd2BCG3FLmbAdYp-DOtcI=/29JHWMjcNUL5EFd5tQ4oB9LOajtpjFRdFw3OLUGhxr0=?refcode=X_113019_EOM_C&amount=25&recurring=auto)**

name: Christina Finello
subject: A pledged donor just backed out on me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress |
body:
Hey Peter -- wish I didn’t have to ask, but a supporter who pledged $1000 by the end of this month just backed out on me, so now we’re short of our November goal. I know you’re spending time with family and enjoying your Saturday, but it’s the end of the month, and I’m counting on you to help me make up the difference and raise another $1000. Can you pitch in now? Link here: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finelloforcongress-nd**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12384275/127350662/-1224662069?refcode=CFN20191130.ND&refcode2=fQnA4OOa1mlYCtUOYkVm&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODI3MmY1NS05YjEzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2WKpzjlS-kK1y0v3v55l3e4T1jhbF4XR8x35d6xLC4A=)

If we win PA-01, we’ll grow the Democratic majority in the House and help candidates up and down the ticket win in Bucks and Montgomery Counties next year. Hillary Clinton, Governor Wolf, and Senator Casey all won here in 2016 and 2018 \-- AND we flipped the Bucks County board of commissioners earlier this month.

Winning this seat will allow me to go to DC and work hard to ensure that every family has access to affordable health care coverage and no one has to go bankrupt over mounting medical bills or student debt.

The stakes are high in this race, and I’m counting on your help.

If you can, please, pitch in here: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finelloforcongress-nd**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12384276/127350663/-1224662069?refcode=CFN20191130.ND&refcode2=fQnA4OOa1mlYCtUOYkVm&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODI3MmY1NS05YjEzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2WKpzjlS-kK1y0v3v55l3e4T1jhbF4XR8x35d6xLC4A=)

Thank you for being on this team, and for everything you do to make our communities and our country a better place to live every day.

-Christina

| Paid for by Finello for Congress |
---|---|---

Finello for Congress
P.O. Box 2772
Warminster, PA 18974
United States

****
Over the last few weeks, I've been traveling the country -- from California to Iowa to New Hampshire. And the thing I keep hearing again and again is that so many Democratic voters are scared right now.

**They 're scared we're going to lose the biggest election of our lifetimes because we chose to elevate a platform that is impossible to implement.**

Voters will ultimately see through policy proposals like Medicare for All or the Green New Deal because of the havoc they'll wreak on our economy and health care system. And because getting universal health care and fighting climate change are too important -- honestly, we can't afford to get it wrong.

That's why we urgently need a voice of pragmatism to cut through the noise and partisan talking points. And if we're going to be that voice, I'm going to need your help.

**Will you chip in a few dollars today to stand with our campaign?**

body:
It's the end of the month and we need your help. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/adf4231f7c66/calling-all-patriots-12077985?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=d7226b2027&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=cc3bfc39c7&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=803ef30f0d&e=795c6d9796 "DONATE NOW")
---
| Peter, Since we announced our campaign we've been working hard to get our message to Oklahomans across the district. Everywhere we go we meet people who are disappointed in the job Kendra Horn has done with their vote and are ready to flip this district red again.

But campaigns take resources, and we need your help to make sure we can keep fighting to get Oklahoma values back to Washington.

[**Will you donate $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 before our month-end deadline tonight and help us keep up our campaign to flip Oklahoma's 5th district red again?**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=6e1945e653&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [QUICK DONATE $5](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=0c450aad5b&e=795c6d9796 "QUICK DONATE $5")
---
| [QUICK DONATE $10](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=22da96e612&e=795c6d9796 "QUICK DONATE $10")
---
| [QUICK DONATE $15](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=b8bd7141c3&e=795c6d9796 "QUICK DONATE $15")
---
| [QUICK DONATE $25](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=4f7b2534d6&e=795c6d9796 "QUICK DONATE $25")
---
| [QUICK DONATE $50](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=ddb91ca075&e=795c6d9796 "QUICK DONATE $50")
---
| Since she's gotten to Congress Kendra Horn has been nothing but a rubber-stamp for Pelosi's far-left agenda. She's much more interested in impeaching President Trump and using your tax dollar for abortion than she is in pushing the common-sense solutions Oklahomans need.

But just because she's out of step with our values doesn't mean that we won't have a fight on our hands to flip this district.

The Associated Press has called Oklahoma's 5th Congressional District "a seat both parties expect to work fiercely to win in 2020." National Journal said this is the **nation's #1 battleground district** , and Decision Desk HQ said "OK-5 is guaranteed to be one of 2020's most bitterly fought House elections."

The 5th Congressional District is going to be ground zero for the fight to take back the House in 2020. [**That's why we need your help.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=a43bc9d70a&e=795c6d9796)

[**Will you contribute $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 to help us meet our month-end deadline and keep up our fight for Oklahoma values?**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=750e86f1a4&e=795c6d9796)

For Freedom,

[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=f39a0b934d&e=795c6d9796) Janet Barresi

| Peter, We have just a few hours to go before our month-end deadline and we need your help.

In order for us to have any chance of flipping this blue district red in 2020 we need to have the resources to get our message out to voters.

**[That's where you come in, will you donate just $3 to help us fight the left and give this conservative Iowa district the representation it deserves in Congress?](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=8ac3863041&e=90fad69796)[ If we get just 7 more donors by tonight we will be on track.](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=0b1a67e09f&e=90fad69796)**

I know this district, my home, shares our values. It voted for President Trump by five points in 2016 and has thousands of hard-working families that just want a chance to experience the American Dream. The left's socialist policies aren't what they're looking for and the common-sense solutions conservatives are advocating for align with their Iowa values.

Together we can secure the border, bring down the cost of healthcare, rein in our out of control debt, do right by our farmers, and defend Iowa values in Washington.

[**But we need the resources to get our message out there. Please consider donating just $3 by TONIGHT to help us fight for Iowa and flip this district red in 2020.**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=93462fae6f&e=90fad69796)

Thank you so much!

For Iowa,
[](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=4953433818&e=90fad69796)
Bobby Schilling

Friend,
If you want a real champion for the working-class families of New York’s 17th Congressional District — it’s Mondaire Jones. **He’s made it clear from day one of his campaign where he stands on the issues:**
✅ A $15 minimum wage
✅ Medicare for All
✅ Tuition-free public college
✅ Affordable, universal childcare
✅ Student debt forgiveness
Mondaire knows from his own family and childhood experiences that these aren’t just flashy policies, **these are real solutions to the struggles New Yorkers face every day.**
We have a chance to elect a bold, progressive voice to Congress who will champion the issues that families in New York care about most. **But this all depends on whether we raise the resources we need to build a winning campaign.**
****

We were reminded of this truth during the Democratic presidential debate last week. And we are faced with the same reality in this race.
There are already 7 Democratic candidates running for New York’s 17th Congressional District — **but none have made it clear like Mondaire that they’re running for big, progressive change.**
Some people will try to say our campaign is too ambitious, but nothing is “too ambitious” about making sure every child has the opportunity to reach their full potential or protecting families from the greedy, corporate interests that pay for influence from our leaders.**It’s what's right.**

clean_body: Today is our last day to reach our November fundraising goal. If you want a real champion for the working-class families of New York’s 17th Congressional District — it’s Mondaire Jones. | | | | ****Today is our last day to reach our November fundraising goal. We’re only 15% percent away from raising the funds we need to build a winning campaign. Even $5 makes a huge difference when we’re this close to the goal. Friend, If you want a real champion for the working-class families of New York’s 17th Congressional District — it’s Mondaire Jones. He’s made it clear from day one of his campaign where he stands on the issues: ✅ A $15 minimum wage ✅ Medicare for All ✅ Tuition-free public college ✅ Affordable, universal childcare ✅ Student debt forgiveness Mondaire knows from his own family and childhood experiences that these aren’t just flashy policies, these are real solutions to the struggles New Yorkers face every day. We have a chance to elect a bold, progressive voice to Congress who will champion the issues that families in New York care about most. But this all depends on whether we raise the resources we need to build a winning campaign. ** , the truth is that not all Democrats are the same. We were reminded of this truth during the Democratic presidential debate last week. And we are faced with the same reality in this race. There are already 7 Democratic candidates running for New York’s 17th Congressional District — but none have made it clear like Mondaire that they’re running for big, progressive change. Some people will try to say our campaign is too ambitious, but nothing is “too ambitious” about making sure every child has the opportunity to reach their full potential or protecting families from the greedy, corporate interests that pay for influence from our leaders.It’s what's right. ** Team Mondaire | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. | | We didn't expect this, Derek.

First, Senator Kaine emailed you.
Next, Senator Warner emailed you.
Then, our Finance Director Jenny emailed you.

They've all been saying the same thing: Mark Warner needs your help to hit his November fundraising goal.

**The response was much bigger than we expected:** donations from across Virginia and all over the country started coming in -- even over the Thanksgiving holiday.

**It now looks like there's some hope that we won't miss our November goal after all, but we need your help to get there, Derek. body:

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3831%2E377263%2E3pCa0X) Yang Gang --

Today is the day we either hit our $2 million end-of-month goal, or we fall short for the very first time in Yang Gang fundraising history.

How we respond on this last day will say a lot to the world about where we are in terms of building this movement. Whether we’re thriving, or slowing down. Whether we make the December debate stage, or lose our momentum just when we need it most.

[We have to show that we’re growing and still hitting goals -- that we’re stronger than ever. Let’s do what it takes: can you pitch in $10 or more to ensure we get to $2 million by midnight tonight? ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18325?t=5&akid=3831%2E377263%2E3pCa0X) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18325?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=3831%2E377263%2E3pCa0X)

_In 2001, she attempted to force through a sales tax – which would have been the first in state history._

**Thankfully, Shaheen failed – but it exposed the type of double-talking politician she really is.**

**Two decades later, Shaheen’s political career is somehow still ongoing – and that’s where you come in. Shaheen is a U.S. Senator, and after endorsing Hillary Clinton in 2016, we need to raise funds to send Shaheen home for good.**

body:
| |
---
| Team,

We just ran the numbers, and as of 8:00 AM, we're still only 75% of the way to our goal. We can't fall short of a single goal or we could fall short of victory in this primary race. _**[Will you chip in $27 or more right away?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-113019_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

We need to hit every goal to keep fighting for the issues that matter most to the people of Massachusetts and across the country.

From the Green New Deal to gun safety to reproductive freedom to immigrant rights and economic inequality -- Ed is leading the charge to move progress forward.

But if we fall short of our goals, we could risk falling short of victory in the primary.

The early funds we can raise now will be critical for winning, and Ed is counting on you.

name: Cory Booker
subject: Midnight tonight, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
We are now one month away from 2020. And we're less than a year out from the November 2020 general election.
| | |
---
| Midnight tonight, team. That's the deadline to hit our $1.5 million goal before we close the books on the month of November. This is a critical moment. We are now one month away from 2020,**the year that we 're going to defeat Donald Trump.** On top of that, we're less than a year out from the November 2020 general election, **the day that we 're going to defeat Donald Trump.** **We 're closing in on our goal. Right now, we only have $186,951.04 left to raise. Will you help us make up the difference by midnight tonight?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191130_CB_20191130-fr-CB-EOM1-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

Now is the time when we need to be scaling up our campaign. It's why we've launched a six-figure ad buy to boost our polling numbers and qualify for the December debate. I know that we can do this.
Cory

name: Team MJ Hegar
subject: Double your impact to beat Sen. Cornyn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Sen. Cornyn has forgotten he's supposed to represent Texans, not special interests. And it's time we remind him.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890964/7f51f7bc/4bacbc6c/4ef08915/2080118039/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | **[All donations MATCHED!
Pitch in before midnight >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890964/7f51f7bc/4bacbc6c/4ef08909/2080118039/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU3NCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-novmatch?refcode=email_20191130.1nd__574__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
---
Peter,

Senator John Cornyn isn't fighting for Texans. Instead, he's teamed up with Mitch McConnell to give a major tax break to the super-wealthy, voted against lowering prescription drug costs, and refused to support universal background checks after receiving thousands of dollars from the NRA.

**Sen. Cornyn has forgotten he's supposed to represent _Texans_ , not special interests. And it's time we remind him. [Make a matched donation right now to help defeat him.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890964/7f51f7bc/4bacbc6c/4ef08909/2080118039/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU3NCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-novmatch?refcode=email_20191130.1nd__574__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Sen. Cornyn has almost $11 million in the bank, fueled by special interests and corporate PACs, so if MJ's going to beat him, we need to keep up the momentum. That means we've got to hit our November goal. **Pitch in and your donation will make twice the impact to replace Senator Cornyn with a leader who'll fight for Texans.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

****[Express donate $50 ($100 value!)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890964/7f51f7bc/4bacbc6c/4ef08902/2080118039/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU3NCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-novmatch?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191130.1nd__574__&amount=50")****
******[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890964/7f51f7bc/4bacbc6c/4ef08901/2080118039/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU3NCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-novmatch?refcode=email_20191130.1nd__574__")******

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Before MIDNIGHT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Today is crucial to my campaign. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=3089618c2033dc4a34bf78b14d8b13fb55bbffb52de76ef3f60ecc6878d6b485998df3e79d28ff3991a70bb850879e2d50565d1ce22aefa4)
---

Friend,

I emailed you.

My sons, Don Jr. and Eric, both emailed you.

Newt Gingrich emailed you.

My campaign manager, Brad Parscale, emailed you.

Trump Finance Team emailed you.

_**Now I 'm emailing you. Again.**_

My team has been sending me daily updates with a list of every patriotic supporter who has stepped up to help us reach our November fundraising goal.

I just looked at today's list and noticed that your name is still MISSING. Why is that, Friend?

I'm reaching out one last time because we need to raise another $250,000 before 11:59 PM TONIGHT in order to reach our November fundraising goal.
**All contributions made before 11:59 PM TONIGHT will be instantly TRIPLE-MATCHED.**

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: I'm fighting alongside dedicated conservatives to defend our Republican Senate Majority and protect the White House from the Left and their radical, extremist agenda. Can I count on you to join me in our fight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
body:
The Republican Majority is working for the American people. But our work and the progress on our agenda is under threat if we don't reach our goal by midnight tonight.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, click [here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDEyMjk4MDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjcyNzI2NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Dear Peter,

I'm reaching out because we're up against a tight deadline and we're just short of our goal. Luckily, dedicated Team Marsha members unlocked 300% matching on all donations through Midnight!
[**< 3X MATCH BEFORE MIDNIGHT >**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDEyMjk4MDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjcyNzI2NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
This is one of the last fundraising deadlines of the year before we head into 2020, and we want to make sure we have the resources necessary to defend the Senate Majority and protect the White House in what will be a truly historic election.
Normally, I wouldn't need to remind you about what's on the line, but the Democrats' sham impeachment hearings have distracted Americans from all of the momentum we've gathered under conservative leadership:

We've confirmed 160 of President Trump's judicial nominees.
We've cut taxes and updated the tax code.
We've stood up for the lives of the unborn.
We've fought to secure our borders.
We've taken on the Silicon Valley elites and their liberal bias.
We've created an unprecedented number of jobs and brought the unemployment rate to a historic low.
**The Republican Majority is _working_ for the American people.**

But our work and progress on our agenda is under threat if we don't reach our goal by midnight tonight. I'm fighting alongside dedicated conservatives to defend our Republican Senate Majority and protect the White House from the Left and their radical, extremist agenda.

_Can I count on you to join me in our fight?_
[**Remember, all donations are matched 300% before the deadline!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDEyMjk4MDUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjcyNzI2NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

** **

********

Peter, I’m running up against a crucial deadline, and I need your help.

While Anthony Brindisi is in Washington cozying up to the D.C. elite and liberal billionaires, I’ve been busy talking to Upstate New Yorkers and fighting to expose Anthony’s track record of accomplishing NOTHING in Congress.

Time and time again, Anthony Brindisi has proven that he doesn’t support Upstate New York values. He’s voted to allow taxpayer-funded abortions, delay construction on the border wall, take away our Second Amendment rights and now **impeachment.**

**We need to raise $10,000 before midnight TONIGHT to keep up with Brindisi’s liberal dark money machine.**

clean_body: While Anthony Brindisi is in Washington cozying up to the D.C. elite and liberal billionaires, I’ve been busy talking to Upstate New Yorkers... | | | Peter, I’m running up against a crucial deadline, and I need your help. While Anthony Brindisi is in Washington cozying up to the D.C. elite and liberal billionaires, I’ve been busy talking to Upstate New Yorkers and fighting to expose Anthony’s track record of accomplishing NOTHING in Congress. Time and time again, Anthony Brindisi has proven that he doesn’t support Upstate New York values. He’s voted to allow taxpayer-funded abortions, delay construction on the border wall, take away our Second Amendment rights and now impeachment. We need to raise $10,000 before midnight TONIGHT to keep up with Brindisi’s liberal dark money machine. ALL CONTRIBUTIONS DOUBLE-MATCHED By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with Revv or WinRed, your donation will go through automatically. Upstate New Yorkers have been forgotten by their elected officials like Governor Cuomo and Anthony Brindisi. They represent liberal New York City values, not Upstate New York. As your Congresswoman, I will bring our Upstate values to Washington by lowering taxes, cutting job-killing regulations, and protecting our Second Amendment rights. But I need your help to make it to Washington first. Peter, your contribution will be DOUBLE-MATCHED if you chip in before midnight tonight. By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with Revv or WinRed, your donation will go through automatically. Meanwhile, Anthony Brindisi is busy hiding out in his Capitol Hill office while Democrats carry out the witch hunt against President Trump that HE VOTED FOR! body:
Thanks for being a supporter of our campaign. Can you make your first donation right now before our end of month fundraising deadline?
We have 39 days until the end of the year. Can you chip in $39 to my campaign right now?
|
---
**There are just a few hours before our end of month deadline, friends.[Will you donate $39 right now to help us meet our fundraising goal?](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff095/522d4087/7afc81dc/4f3418f4/2504941308/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191130_em_am&amount=39")** | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff095/522d4087/7afc81dc/4f3418f3/2504941308/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191130_em_am")**
---
In December, we need to invest in growing our team and opening up our first campaign office. We need you to step up and make your first contribution to our campaign before tonight at midnight to make it happen.
**[So, if you can, chip in before midnight tonight-- every dollar goes a long way.](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff095/522d4087/7afc81dc/4f3418f3/2504941308/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191130_em_am")**
\-- Team Stephanie

\---------- Forwarded Message ----------
Date: Wednesday, November 27
Re: Can you make your first donation
From: Team Schmid

| | Friends -- We started this campaign with a modest, but hard-working team--just Stephanie and one staff member. In our first month, we nearly outraised our opponent, a 39-year incumbent. Three months later, we have four staffers and we're building the plans we need to flip this district in 2020. To keep growing, we need to hire a few more people and open a campaign office. **It 'll take $2,100 to open up our first campaign office--that includes our rent, wifi, desks, chairs, and a lot of coffee.** **[Can you chip in $39 today? Your donation will help us open our first campaign office.](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff095/522d4087/7afc81dc/4f3418f4/2504941308/VEsC/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191130_em_am&amount=39")** | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff095/522d4087/7afc81dc/4f3418f4/2504941308/VEsD/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191130_em_am&amount=39")**
---
From day one, we've run a grassroots campaign. No frills. No big donors footing the bills.
We don't have dark money groups or corporate PACs on our side: We have you, grassroots supporters who want to see real change in New Jersey's 4th district.
We're going to ask you to do a lot over the next year--knock on doors, make phone calls, and yes, donate--because the only way we are going to win is by working together to make real change in this district.
**Now, we need to ask you to step up and make your first contribution.[Can we count on you to chip in $39 to help us open our first campaign office?](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff095/522d4087/7afc81dc/4f3418f4/2504941308/VEsA/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191130_em_am&amount=39")**
-- Team Stephanie
|

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**

_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey

To keep growing, we need to hire a few more people and open a campaign office. It 'll take $2,100 to open up our first campaign office--that includes our rent, wifi, desks, chairs, and a lot of coffee. "" | "" From day one, we've run a grassroots campaign. No frills. No big donors footing the bills. We don't have dark money groups or corporate PACs on our side: We have you, grassroots supporters who want to see real change in New Jersey's 4th district. We're going to ask you to do a lot over the next year--knock on doors, make phone calls, and yes, donate--because the only way we are going to win is by working together to make real change in this district. Now, we need to ask you to step up and make your first contribution. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Susan Collins is showing her true colors for Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, In the midst of the impeachment inquiry, the president has been sweet-talking the senators who will serve as the jury during his almost certain trial. Guess which "moderate" went to meet with him? Susan Collins has spent the last 20 years keeping her Senate seat by pretending to be a moderate. Like Lucy with the football, she tries to make us believe that this time, she'll save us and actually be a voice of reason. But when push comes to shove? She puts Brett Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court. She says she's a moderate on immigration? She just voted to elevate the guy who designed Trump's plan to rip immigrant children seeking asylum away from their families and put them in cages. People are finally starting to catch on that she's not just going to pull the football out from under us \-- she'll make sure it has a lifetime appointment to slam us in the head, too. She has a job approval rating of just 35% in Maine. She lost the endorsement of the League of Conservation Voters because of her capitulation to propping up Trump's anti-environment, climate change-denying, soul-crushing administration. _The Cook Political Report_ has classified her Senate race in 2020 as a "toss-up." This is the MOST VULNERABLE she's ever been. This race in Maine is KEY to Democrats winning back the Senate, so we know Mitch McConnell and the GOP will flood Maine with millions in dark money for Republicans to hold onto the majority. But Democrats have an incredible chance this cycle to take down Susan Collins and take back the Senate: her name is Sara Gideon. She's a leader in the fight against climate change in Maine, a steadfast supporter of Medicaid expansion and _Roe v. Wade_ , and she's not about to sell out her values for corrupt corporate sponsorship. 97% of her funding comes from donations of $100 or less. We can flip this Senate seat. We can get rid of Susan Collins and take back the Senate majority from Mitch McConnell. But because Sara is entirely funded by grassroots donations, we can only win if engaged Democrats like you get involved in this race now. [**If you care about getting dark money out of politics, protecting our healthcare access and not letting another Brett Kavanaugh anywhere near the Supreme Court, please fight back against Mitch McConnell and Susan Collins by donating anything, even just $1, today?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcfe/6e9863e8/16d3bb5b/1db0a347/197996081/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sara-gideon-nd?refcode=OUT20191130a.ND&refcode2=HIxmga4sZcsDaj62rthE") Your support is critical to Democrats taking back the Senate in 2020. Thank you, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcfe/6e9863e8/16d3bb5b/1db0a346/197996081/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sara-gideon-nd?refcode=OUT20191130a.ND&refcode2=HIxmga4sZcsDaj62rthE")
---
|

Washington, DC 20003

Out-of-state conservative billionaires have started a state-wide media blitz against Gary - and it's come sooner than ever before in the election cycle. They've spent nearly $1 million in just seven days, all to help buy Michigan's Senate seat for a candidate who supports Trump "2000%."
This new spending is on top of the $3 million Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell have helped funnel into Michigan. Right-wing forces are united and fighting harder than ever to flip Michigan red and expand the GOP's chokehold on the Senate.

Democrats cannot take back the Senate if we lose in Michigan. That's why it's critical that we stop Trump and McConnell from buying Michigan's Senate seat and tightening their grip on power.
**Gary's fighting tooth and nail to win reelection and protect Michigan's Democratic Senate seat, but this race is TIED. That's why we've set a rapid response goal of raising $25,000 by midnight - but even after a surge in donations, we're coming up just $7,450 short. **

Mike's opponent would ally with Nancy Pelosi if elected. To defeat her in 2020, Mike's going to need the help of patriots just like you to prevent the attacks of the unlimited financial resources that liberal groups aim to pour into our district on her behalf.
Like the Squad socialists, she would support Medicare Care for All, open borders, and amnesty for those who entered this country illegally. Ohio can't afford this.

clean_body: This changes everything. Friend,I was getting worried.We were down on our fundraising goal just as a report came out showing that our race is a TOSS-UP and I certainly didn’t want to bother anyone over Thanksgiving......But then a group of donors agreed to offer a DOUBLE MATCH on all contributions made between now and 11:59 P.M.So that means we only have 14 hours to raise $5,284. It’s going to be tough -- but I know we can do it. Thank you, Hunt Captain, U.S. Army Aviation Branch Republican Candidate for Congress\---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Wesley Hunt Date: November 26, 2019 Subject: I wish I had better news To: dpwillis67@gmail.com| Friend, I’ve got to tell you... When a Democrat won this Texas conservative congressional district in 2018, I hoped it was just a fluke. But sadly, a report just came out showing that our race is rated a TOSS-UP once again in 2020. The Democrat won in 2018 because she had the cash advantage. And their fundraising is showing no sign of slowing down at all. Meanwhile, we’re still short of our November goal by $9,274. After Nancy Pelosi bought this district in 2018, we knew we’d have to fight twice as hard to keep Texas red in 2020. The Lone Star State is no place for the radical Left’s socialist agenda, Friend. And I will fight tooth and nail in Congress — just like I did in the Army — to ensure our conservative values are defended. But I need the help of grassroots patriots like you to get there. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Captain, U.S. Army Aviation Branch Republican Candidate for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056| Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch. Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Under federal law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $2800 for the primary election, $2,800 for the primary run-off election, and $2,800 for the general election. Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: In just a few hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
I'm going to ask if you can make a donation to our campaign to help catch up to our fundraising deadline by the end of the day. But before that... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b563/45c30650/11e71bea8/66f90e45/992542523/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I'm going to ask if you can make your first donation to our campaign to help catch up to our fundraising deadline by the end of the day. But before that, I want to talk about why hitting this goal is powerfully important.

Whether or not we reach our goal tonight will make a real difference in the types of investments we can make going forward. And the next few weeks are vital for this movement we're building together.

But even though we're behind our goal, I'm not busy courting wealthy donors at some exclusive event right now to ask for their help. I'm not spending all day calling up so-and-so on the phone and asking if they can write us a ginormous check.

**Instead, I'm reaching out to you. Because this campaign is all about you, not special interests or the rich and powerful, and it's powered by grassroots donors.**

[**Your donation today will make a real difference for the future of this campaign. This month's fundraising goal is powerfully important because of the work we're going to need to do in these next few weeks.

2020 is just around the corner, and soon people from across the country will be getting out to caucus and getting out to vote in the Democratic Primary.

We will continue to do what we've always done: hosting town halls, knocking on doors, and sharing face-to-face conversations with people and inspiring them to join this fight.

But before that... | | | "" I'm going to ask if you can make your first donation to our campaign to help catch up to our fundraising deadline by the end of the day. But before that, I want to talk about why hitting this goal is powerfully important. Whether or not we reach our goal tonight will make a real difference in the types of investments we can make going forward. And the next few weeks are vital for this movement we're building together. But even though we're behind our goal, I'm not busy courting wealthy donors at some exclusive event right now to ask for their help. I'm not spending all day calling up so-and-so on the phone and asking if they can write us a ginormous check. Instead, I'm reaching out to you. Because this campaign is all about you, not special interests or the rich and powerful, and it's powered by grassroots donors. name: Alana Conant, Team HIck
subject: Fundraising around the holidays...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
If you're keeping score (I know I am), Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, countless corporate PACs, and now the Koch network have all made it crystal clear that they have an interest in this race. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377142c/691c9bd/6f966e3a/11a7d005/3787671123/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| Good morning team!

I hope you all had a great Thanksgiving. As for me, I'm feeling reenergized and ready to get back to the work of flipping this Senate seat next year!

First up on my to-do list today: [**_Blow past this fundraising deadline at midnight tonight._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191130_AC_20191130-fr-AC-holidays-2mo_2mo_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Full transparency--fundraising during the holidays is hard, especially for a grassroots campaign like ours. But Cory Gardner's allies in Washington will cut him a check whenever he needs it, so we have to play a little bit of catch up to not fall further behind.

Also, we just learned that Americans for Prosperity--the Koch network's advocacy group--made a six-figure ad buy to support Gardner and other vulnerable Republicans.

If you're keeping score (I know I am); that's Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, countless corporate PACs, and now the Koch network who have made it crystal clear that they have an interest in this race. They're going to stop at nothing to hang onto this seat.

**That 's why I'm reaching out to you this morning and really, really hoping we can rely on you to chip in whatever you can right now to make sure we're keeping pace with Cory Gardner over the holidays.** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away._ [**_DONATE $5 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20191130_AC_20191130-fr-AC-holidays-2mo_2mo_expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Alana
