Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377142c/691c9bd/6f966e3a/11a7d03b/3787671123/VEsHBA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377142c/691c9bd/6f966e3a/11a7d038/3787671123/VEsHBw/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377142c/691c9bd/6f966e3a/11a7d039/3787671123/VEsHBg/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377142c/691c9bd/6f966e3a/11a7d036/3787671123/VEsHAQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377142c/691c9bd/6f966e3a/11a7d037/3787671123/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you'd like to receive only the most important campaign updates, [**_click here_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377142c/691c9bd/6f966e3a/11a7d034/3787671123/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/id-like-to-get-less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377142c/691c9bd/6f966e3a/11a7d03a/3787671123/VEsHAg/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").
clean_body: If you're keeping score (I know I am), Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, countless corporate PACs, and now the Koch network have all made it crystal clear that they have an interest in this race. | | | "" | Good morning team! I hope you all had a great Thanksgiving. As for me, I'm feeling reenergized and ready to get back to the work of flipping this Senate seat next year! First up on my to-do list today: "=" Full transparency--fundraising during the holidays is hard, especially for a grassroots campaign like ours. But Cory Gardner's allies in Washington will cut him a check whenever he needs it, so we have to play a little bit of catch up to not fall further behind. Also, we just learned that Americans for Prosperity--the Koch network's advocacy group--made a six-figure ad buy to support Gardner and other vulnerable Republicans. If you're keeping score (I know I am); that's Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, countless corporate PACs, and now the Koch network who have made it crystal clear that they have an interest in this race. They're going to stop at nothing to hang onto this seat. That 's why I'm reaching out to you this morning and really, really hoping we can rely on you to chip in whatever you can right now to make sure we're keeping pace with Cory Gardner over the holidays. If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away. "=" "=" "=" "=" "=" "=" Thank you so much! Alana Alana Conant Digital Director Hickenlooper for Colorado "=" | | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado P.O. name: Tim Walz
subject: This is our opportunity to change the story
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| My friend, I'm hearing a consistent theme these days as I'm talking with Minnesotans across our state: People are sick and tired of the chaos, negativity, and dangerous rhetoric that's coming out of the White House. I couldn't agree more. It's poisoning our political process. Unfortunately, Minnesota Republicans continue to rally around President Trump and his divisive rhetoric. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ByXTSiMsbN6-2YmEqbCEpuE_04pwaIL801yAVmXzxDM=/IDXNJmh5vhwCONJgBiWZaGCfTSQgwpNHwQA1wQrfLeA=?refcode=header&amount=25)
---
My friend,
I'm hearing a consistent theme these days as I'm talking with Minnesotans across our state: People are sick and tired of the chaos, negativity, and dangerous rhetoric that's coming out of the White House.
I couldn't agree more. It's poisoning our political process. Unfortunately, Minnesota Republicans continue to rally around President Trump and his divisive rhetoric.
The good news is we have a historic opportunity to change the story next year, and I'm going to do everything I can to make sure we seize it.
I'm working with our campaign team to support allies up and down the ballot who will help us fight for a brighter future for our state. And with the Trump campaign planning to spend tens of millions of dollars broadcasting their toxic message across Minnesota, we need you with us more than ever.
**Our November end-of-month deadline is at midnight and we 're still more than $2,000 short of our goal. [Will you make a contribution of $5 or more to help us make up the difference before we run out of time? We can't afford to come up short.](https://act.myngp.com/el/ByXTSiMsbN6-2YmEqbCEpuE_04pwaIL801yAVmXzxDM=/IDXNJmh5vhwCONJgBiWZaGCfTSQgwpNHwQA1wQrfLeA=?refcode=body&amount=25)**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
******[Express Donate: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/ByXTSiMsbN6-2YmEqbCEpuE_04pwaIL801yAVmXzxDM=/IDXNJmh5vhwCONJgBiWZaGCfTSQgwpNHwQA1wQrfLeA=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=_25-p)******
******[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/ByXTSiMsbN6-2YmEqbCEpuE_04pwaIL801yAVmXzxDM=/IDXNJmh5vhwCONJgBiWZaGCfTSQgwpNHwQA1wQrfLeA=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=_50-p)******
******[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/ByXTSiMsbN6-2YmEqbCEpuE_04pwaIL801yAVmXzxDM=/IDXNJmh5vhwCONJgBiWZaGCfTSQgwpNHwQA1wQrfLeA=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=_100-p)******
******[Express Donate: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/ByXTSiMsbN6-2YmEqbCEpuE_04pwaIL801yAVmXzxDM=/IDXNJmh5vhwCONJgBiWZaGCfTSQgwpNHwQA1wQrfLeA=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=_250-p)******
******[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/ByXTSiMsbN6-2YmEqbCEpuE_04pwaIL801yAVmXzxDM=/IDXNJmh5vhwCONJgBiWZaGCfTSQgwpNHwQA1wQrfLeA=?refcode=_other-p)******
Our 2019 fundraising numbers will be made public for the first time in early January.
We need to make sure they send a clear message that Minnesotans are ready to reject _any_ candidate who embraces the politics of fear and division in 2020.
**Reaching our November goal tonight is the first hurdle we need to clear to get the job done.[Please, make a contribution right away to help us get there.](https://act.myngp.com/el/ByXTSiMsbN6-2YmEqbCEpuE_04pwaIL801yAVmXzxDM=/IDXNJmh5vhwCONJgBiWZaGCfTSQgwpNHwQA1wQrfLeA=?refcode=body&amount=25)**
Thank you for everything you do for this campaign.
I'm grateful,
Tim Walz
| **********[**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ByXTSiMsbN6-2YmEqbCEpuE_04pwaIL801yAVmXzxDM=/IDXNJmh5vhwCONJgBiWZaGCfTSQgwpNHwQA1wQrfLeA=?refcode=button-p&amount=25)**********
---

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Fw: Elect a combat veteran to Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Church for Wisconsin
body:
It is undeniable that our campaign continues to gain momentum ahead of the critical primary election that will be held on February 18th, 2020.
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638480:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r)
Friend,

Jason Church has dedicated all of his life to service to country. Jason is a soldier who, like me, served in combat in Afghanistan. Jason and I both led men and women on dangerous missions, and we know the tough decisions that come with that responsibility.

Jason sacrificed much for this country. While on a routine patrol with his platoon in 2012, Jason was hit by an IED blast resulting in the loss of both of his legs.

I can tell you that after meeting Jason and hearing his powerful story, it is evident to me that he is exactly what Congress needs. He has not been deterred by the loss of his legs that day. [_**He is a true leader, who still has a burning passion inside him for service to our country!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638480:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r)

[_**Did you see my previous email?**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638480:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r) I officially endorsed Jason Church for Congress in a critical special election in Wisconsin, less than three months from now!

Not familiar with Jason, [_**HERE**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638480:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r) is his announcement video introducing himself in this key race.

[_**This upcoming special election is absolutely critical to the future makeup of Congress!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638480:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r) This race has national implications. Democrats are hoping to flip a reliable GOP seat and are emboldened by recent wins in Kentucky, Louisiana, and Virginia. They want to win in the important swing state of Wisconsin, a critical state in the reelection of President Donald Trump.

As you can see when you turn on the news every night, America is at a crossroads. [_**It can continue to be run by career politicians like Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and Adam Schiff, or we can take give the power back to the people themselves by electing individuals like Jason Church, who are not career politicians!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638480:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r)

Since launching his campaign in September, Jason has been traveling up and down Wisconsin's 7th district meeting with Northern Wisconsinites. Here are some pictures, we have collected.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638480:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638480:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r)

Jason's commitment to the American people, service, and conservative values is what Washington, D.C. needs right now. And I know that when elected, Jason will make the needed hard choices in Congress on behalf of the people of his district.

I encourage you to join me in support of his campaign for Congress before time runs out!

How can you help? [_**In less than 48 hours, Jason has a critical November fundraising deadline and needs all our help!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638480:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r) With less than three months remaining in this key race, each end of month deadline is so important. This one is no different.

[_**Can you rush in $15, $35, or $45 today to support a combat veteran in a crucial special election with national implications for the future makeup of Congress?**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638480:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r)
_**[Rush $15 to support Jason Church-> ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638481:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r)

[Rush $35 to support Jason Church -> ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638482:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r)

[Rush $45 to support Jason Church -> ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638480:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r)

[Rush any amount to support Jason Church ->](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638480:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r)**_
[_**Please consider donating to Jason Church TODAY!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638480:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r) I am proud to stand by him and serve with him in Congress once elected. Help Jason reach his key fundraising goal by tomorrow night at midnight by rushing in a donation today!

Thank you,

Tom Cotton

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Tom Cotton
Date: Wed, Nov 20, 2019 at 11:30 AM
Subject: Re: Elect a Combat Veteran to Congress

Friend,
This week, I officially endorsed Jason Church for Congress.
Jason Church is running in a critical special election in Wisconsin's 7th congressional district that will be held on February 18th. [_**With less than three months before Election Day, Jason needs your help now**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638480:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r). This race has national ramifications for the future makeup of Congress.
Jason is an Army combat veteran who like me, served in Afghanistan. Jason and I both led men and women on dangerous missions, and we know the tough decisions that come with that responsibility.
In 2012, Jason was leading his platoon on a routine patrol when he was struck by the IED blast that took both his legs. It took Jason twenty one different surgeries to recover. [_**He believes that every American has a call to duty that they must answer**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638480:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r). This is fueling his run for Congress.
Even though Jason lost his legs on the battlefield, it didn't extinguish his desire to serve. Jason is a Trump supporter. He knows that President Trump has tough decisions to make every day. [_**Jason will stand up to obstructionists in Congress Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff, and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez who are dragging our country closer to gridlock and socialism**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638480:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r).
After spending quality time with Jason Church, I am convinced now more than ever that Jason's service to our country cannot end on the battlefield. [_**His commitment to the American people and, most importantly, to conservative values is needed in Washington, D.C**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638480:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r). I know that Jason can make the hard choices in Congress on behalf of the people of Wisconsin.
I'm proud to endorse a fellow soldier, Jason Church, and encourage you to join me in support of his campaign for Congress. [_**Rush in $15, $35, or $45 today to help elect a combat veteran to Congress today!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638480:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r)
[_**Rush in $75 NOW to support Jason Church for Congress!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638480:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r) [_****_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638480:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r)[_****_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638483:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r)
[_**Rush in $50 NOW to support Jason Church for Congress!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638484:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r) [_****_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638480:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r)[_****_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638483:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r)
[_**Rush in $45 NOW to support Jason Church for Congress!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638480:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r) [_****_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638480:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r)[_****_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638483:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r)
[_**Rush in Any Amount NOW to support Jason Church for Congress!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53638480:shFMNrvNs:m:1:2159917919:273856EAB8B19F212FBC62AF63FB2521:r)

Thank you,

Tom Cotton

| Paid for by Church for Wisconsin

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: Will you make a contribution before we close the books on November in just a few hours?
body:
Midnight. Tonight.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f7f/4bef7a87/6b8c1b5f/287ffb29/50490221/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**Tonight at midnight, we have a very important end-of-month deadline. We set a goal of raising $150,000 to get us back on track to hit our fundraising goal this quarter and announce a really great number when our FEC report goes public.**
[**Will you make a contribution before we close the books on November in just a few hours?**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f7f/4bef7a87/6b8c1b5f/287ffb28/50490221/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMzAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november-eom?refcode=em191130-full")
****_End-of-month fundraising drive_
Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Supporter ID: 222638
Donor status: No, not yet!
Suggested contribution: [$3](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f7f/4bef7a87/6b8c1b5f/287ffb28/50490221/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMzAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november-eom?refcode=em191130-full")****
We are powering this campaign through lots and lots of people giving small amounts of money. Susan Collins has special interest groups and corporate PACs on her side - but we have you, and that's why we're going to win.
\- Team Sara
********[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f7f/4bef7a87/6b8c1b5f/287ffb28/50490221/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMzAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november-eom?refcode=em191130-full")********

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f7f/4bef7a87/6b8c1b5f/287ffb2f/50490221/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f7f/4bef7a87/6b8c1b5f/287ffb2e/50490221/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Tina Smith
subject: It's been a tough month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I'm reaching out to ask you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign for U.S. Senate in Minnesota. Your support is so important right now.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191130-quick?refcode=em191130-quick&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend --

**I'll make this quick. I'm reaching out to ask you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign for U.S. Senate in Minnesota. Your support is so important right now. You can donate right here:** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191130-quick?refcode=em191130-quick&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191130-quick?refcode=em191130-quick&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
Unlike a lot of other politicians, I don't rely on special interest groups or wealthy mega-donors who call the shots in Washington. Instead, I'm running a campaign powered by folks like you pitching in whatever you can afford to keep us going strong. It may not be the easy way to do things, but it's the _right_ way.

**The truth is, though, it looks like we may fall short of our online fundraising goal for November and the deadline is at midnight.** It's been a tough month for fundraising, but I'm counting on you to help us catch up fast before the clock runs out on us.

**Will you pitch in today to help our campaign reach this end-of-month goal before midnight? Anything you can give will make a meaningful difference in our work to keep Minnesota blue.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191130-quick?refcode=em191130-quick&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191130-quick?refcode=em191130-quick&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")

---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191130-quick?refcode=em191130-quick&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Every contribution we receive from emails just like this one helps me spend less time worrying about our fundraising numbers and more time talking with Minnesotans about the issues that matter most to them.

That's why your donation matters so much right now. Thanks.

-- Tina

Will you pitch in today to help our campaign reach this end-of-month goal before midnight? Anything you can give will make a meaningful difference in our work to keep Minnesota blue. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "=" Every contribution we receive from emails just like this one helps me spend less time worrying about our fundraising numbers and more time talking with Minnesotans about the issues that matter most to them. That's why your donation matters so much right now. Thanks. -- Tina

name: C Finello
subject: I’m stressing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress |
body:
Peter -- Thanksgiving really cut into our fundraising this month, but we’re REALLY close to finalizing our goal. (You can’t see my fingers, but I’m holding them close together.) Seriously, we’re almost there!! This month has been hectic \-- going from events to forums to local Dems meetings on top of still working and making sure I have time with my family, things have been busy to say the least. But the levels of energy and engagement on the ground have been through the roof, especially in Lower Bucks (where I’m from).

They are curious about how we’re going to be successful beating Fitzpatrick in 2020 if we haven’t done it before, but what sets me apart is the fact that I know Lower Bucks and the people here. I’m a Democrat, but I’m also a municipal leader, and I’ve got the support of moderates and conservatives alike as well as progressives and independents. We share the same core values that makes me proud to be a Democrat!

I’m the Democrat that can flip this seat, and I’ll bust my tail to make sure we do. We’re just $230 short, and I am stressed about falling short again. Please. Can I count on you now?

Here’s the link to give any amount you can: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finelloforcongress**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12392207/127434441/2063951955?refcode=CFN20191130b&refcode2=TnbSQq8OUKml75tiftEk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2VjMzA4Yi1jNDEzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=imn43fULTCHa-T7foBc9fcN08ewtVNDBHyu5I5MmWwM=)

Thank YOU!!

Chris

| Paid for by Finello for Congress |
---|---|---

Finello for Congress
P.O. Box 2772
Warminster, PA 18974
United States

subject: Small Business Saturday: Get your official campaign gear!
body:
Just in time for “Small Business Saturday”, you can now get an official “Laura Loomer for Congress” tee and cap!
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-355129-828022-4735593-0b242f93df-80762c4b8f)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-355129-828022-4735593-0b242f93df-80762c4b8f) Just in time for “Small Business Saturday”, you can now get an official “Laura Loomer for Congress” tee and cap!

[Click here to buy today!](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-355129-828022-4735593-0b242f93df-80762c4b8f)

Not only will you be supporting my campaign, but you’ll also be supporting "Fat Enzo T-shirts" a local, small business owner that takes pride in producing American-made custom products!

You can get the double-sided tee with our campaign logo on the front and “LauraLoomerforCongress.com” on the back or purchase our embroidered campaign cap.

And for Small Business Saturday, we’re offering a tee and cap combo at a discount!

For the die-hard campaign collectors, we’re offering a signed combo as well.

Show your America-first pride, [by ordering today](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-355129-828022-4735593-0b242f93df-80762c4b8f). You won’t just be supporting my campaign, but you’ll be giving a boost to a local small business owner and their hard-working employees.

Thanks again for all that you do and please enjoy the rest of your holiday weekend.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

| Team,

Hours left for the _Rains for Montana_ belt buckle challenge! Every $10 donation to the campaign earns a raffle ticket for the buckle! Rural Montana needs a champion in Congress. I hope the holidays have gone well and the weather hasn't caused problems. I wish every hard working Montanan the best and I truly appreciate your time reading this email and support! [**We just need to raise another $4,376 to meet our end-of-month goal: Will you donate $5 or more again right now?**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7777?t=5&akid=7998%2E868730%2EwJ4FZx) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7888?t=6&akid=7998%2E868730%2EwJ4FZx)

Actually, by this time in two weeks, we'll already be well into our first day of the freeze (with nearly four months to go) -- we have to stop fundraising at midnight on December 14th. That'll come faster than you think -- and it'll last longer than you think.
That's exactly why we re-opened our end-of-month deadline -- because every single dollar makes a real difference. So I'm asking you, right now, when it matters so much:
[**Will you chip in $5 or more right now to help us raise the final $4,376 to hit our $30,000 end-of-month goal?**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7777?t=13&akid=7998%2E868730%2EwJ4FZx)
Very truly yours,
Jay

body:

|
---
| |
---

| | Hello friends: We're less than one day from this crucial end-of-month goal. I know Jordan originally set the goal of a little over $3,000, but the dedication of this grassroots network has really shown through and we already hit our mark. But due to all the monkey business of this past week in Washington, DC, we launched a digital ad that really hit the mark. I want to keep it running online, so, I'm setting a new goal to raise another $1,000 before midnight tonight. **So, I 'm setting a new goal to raise another $1,000 before midnight tonight. [Can you pitch in?](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f242b/33365068/4a6278d3/3f8b8d79/1802415101/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191130_em_fr_tf_b1_all&amount=15")** | [**$5**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f242b/33365068/4a6278d3/3f8b8d7a/1802415101/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191130_em_fr_tf_b1_all&amount=5") | **[$35](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f242b/33365068/4a6278d3/3f8b8d7b/1802415101/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191130_em_fr_tf_b1_all&amount=35")** | **[$50](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f242b/33365068/4a6278d3/3f8b8d74/1802415101/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191130_em_fr_tf_b1_all&amount=50")**

name: Andrew Yang
subject: In a minute
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
I hope you’ll let me explain why.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3866%2E377263%2Egprvsj) Yang Gang --

In a minute, I’m going to ask you to make your first contribution to our campaign. I hope you’ll let me explain why.

**We’re staring down a deadline at midnight -- and right now we’re falling critically short.**

And hitting this goal is key to funding our expanded ads, organizing, and outreach programs so we can hit the December debate qualifications. As of today, we have just 13 days to reach our final poll to qualify.

The December debate will be the most important yet. More Americans are tuning in and now is the time to define our campaign on the national stage.

We know this is primary is a choice about what future Americans want for their country. And it’s a fight we _must_ win.

We cannot keep doing things the same way and expecting a different result. We have to rewrite the rules of our economy so they work for US again -- not just corporations.

[If you’re with me in this fight -- and you agree it’s as important as I do -- please, pitch in $10 or more now. We will need to give it all we can in the next 11 hours to hit our November goal.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18413?t=5&akid=3866%2E377263%2Egprvsj)

Thank you for everything,

-Andrew | **We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18413?t=6&akid=3866%2E377263%2Egprvsj)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=3866%2E377263%2Egprvsj) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=3866%2E377263%2Egprvsj) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

name: Barack Obama Update
subject: Team, we're asking you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
We were starting to lose hope, Team.

Republicans were spending MILLIONS to attack Democrats and advance the Trump agenda, **but Democrats weren 't donating to help us fight back. **

But then President Obama asked you to make a commitment to electing Democrats... and donations went THROUGH THE ROOF!

body:
Folks -- My team asked me to send you one last email before we close the books on November. Hitting our monthly goals is _**critical**_ to making sure we have the resources we need to push our movement forward. And as we get closer to impeachment and the GOP's attacks on me ramp up, we need to make sure we also have the resources to fight back and set the record straight. **We 're down to the wire here, but I know we can still catch up if everyone pitches in a few dollars. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ed/3eb3e2fc/68774e71/744d5a5d/3076384026/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=10+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191130_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191130_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ed/3eb3e2fc/68774e71/744d5a5c/3076384026/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=20191130_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191130_em_fr_b1_castro_all"). subject: We're standing against foreign election interference. Are you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:

| | Hello Peter, Russia interfered in our 2016 elections. Point blank. The White House and the GOP can lie all they want, but the evidence is staggering. We even saw the president invite more countries to interfere with the 2020 election when he thought it would get him out of trouble for attempting to extort the same from Ukraine. The evidence is also staggering that they, and many other countries, will do the exact same thing in 2020 if we don't work to stop them. That's why we need Congress to do its job and pass the SHIELD Act. This bill would increase transparency around campaign contacts with foreign governments and increase security for our elections. If you agree with us and think our elections need more protection, add your name to ours and call on the Senate to pass the SHIELD Act NOW.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcee/6e9863e8/16cd9887/1db0a34b/2219697597/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/stop-foreign-powers/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you for adding your voice. body:
First, I want to say thank you. I cannot express how much the outpouring of support for our race has meant to me
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12393732/127453600/480453248?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.30_b2_ed_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDY3ZTJiZC1jZTEzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TwaRbKh9sMeVdpfIrPUp4yKC_a9y5tY7SAF4dxFGWBs=) Hey friend,

First, I want to say thank you. I cannot express how much the outpouring of support for our race has meant to me. I decided to run for Congress to fight for the hard-working people of this district, and I am grateful to have so many of you standing by my side.

I also wanted to update you on where we stand for the month. I know my team has been keeping you in the loop about our monthly fundraising goals, but I wanted to make sure I reached out personally.

**We are officially less than $800 away from hitting our end-of-month goal.**

I’m constantly blown away by the incredible force of grassroots support we’ve built here in PA-10. I cannot thank you enough for being a part of this fight with me.

Can you help us in our final push by chipping in a few dollars before midnight? You use this secure link to donate: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasqualeq42019/november**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12393733/127453601/554177247?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.30_b2_ed_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDY3ZTJiZC1jZTEzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TwaRbKh9sMeVdpfIrPUp4yKC_a9y5tY7SAF4dxFGWBs=)

As our campaign picks up even more momentum in the coming months, anything you can contribute today goes a long way in sustaining our grassroots movement.

Thank you for being in this fight with me. Together, I know we can win this race and turn PA-10 blue.

\--Eugene

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben_Ray_Luj=C3=A1n?=
subject: disturbingly;
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | Speaker Pelosi asked.
James Carville asked.
Paul Begala asked.
Tom Udall asked.
Khizr Khan asked.
Deb Haaland asked. [**_After my closest Democratic colleagues -- and President Obama himself -- called on you to flip the Senate, I thought I would see a surge of support before tonight 's critical end-of-month deadline >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191130_em_fr_b2_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") But disturbingly -- for the first time ever -- it's starting to look like I might not hit my goal. I only have 10 hours to meet this deadline, WIN, and DEFEAT McConnell's Senate. **You 've never let me down before. Not once. Can I count on you to come through for me one more time before the match expires at midnight?** | **DEMOCRATIC MATCH: [ACTIVE](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191130_em_fr_b2_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")**

name: Matt Klapper, Cory 2020
subject: As an underdog campaign, we need to work harder to break through
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
It's no secret that Cory has yet to qualify for the December debate.
| | |
---
| Friend, There are only a few hours left until we close the books on our November fundraising, and we haven't reached our $1.5 million end-of-month goal yet. In a minute, I'm going to explain to you why hitting this goal is so important, **[but if you're ready to help us hit it you can chip in here.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191130_MK_20191130-fr-MK-progressupdate-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** It's no secret that Cory has yet to qualify for the December debate. We reached the DNC's 200,000 individual donor threshold the morning after his strong debate performance, which was an incredible and exciting moment for our campaign. **Now, we need to quickly hit 4% in at least four polls -- or 6% in two polls -- to secure Cory 's spot on the December stage.** You may be wondering, why hasn't Cory gotten those polls yet? Well team, I get this question. There are a few headwinds we've been facing. This is Cory's first time running for president, so he didn't enter the race with high name recognition, like some of the frontrunners. He also spent the 2018 election cycle campaigning for candidates in competitive races rather than building his own fundraising list. And hey, let's not forget that this is the most crowded Democratic primary in our country's history -- it can be hard to break out of the pack when we've seen eighteen candidates get into the race. Now let me be clear -- I don't believe it will stay this way. I truly believe there is no candidate better positioned than Cory to beat Donald Trump, heal our country, and achieve justice and opportunity for every American. **But it does mean that as an underdog campaign, we need to work harder to break through.** We know that the more people hear about Cory, the more they like him. So a few days ago, we launched a series of radio and digital ads to introduce people across the country to our campaign. We plan to reach those who are undecided or who have Cory among their top choices and bring them into our campaign. That's how we'll get the polls to qualify for the December debate, and that's how we'll continue to build this campaign, brick by brick, to take Cory all the way to the White House. **[If you believe in this campaign as I do, please consider chipping in to get us closer to reaching our $1.5 million end-of-month goal. Anything you can give will help us fund efforts like our ad program to make sure Cory gets to speak to a national audience once again in December. We saw what he accomplished at last week's debate -- let's do our part to get him back on that stage again.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191130_MK_20191130-fr-MK-progressupdate-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thank you from the bottom of my heart for being a part of this campaign. Matt Matt Klapper
Senior Advisor
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191130_MK_20191130-fr-MK-progressupdate-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0db7/5fca0d19/788f2141/291ca444/2463514401/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0db7/5fca0d19/788f2141/291ca443/2463514401/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0db7/5fca0d19/788f2141/291ca442/2463514401/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0db7/5fca0d19/788f2141/291ca441/2463514401/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0db7/5fca0d19/788f2141/291ca440/2463514401/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0db7/5fca0d19/788f2141/291ca444/2463514401/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").
clean_body: It's no secret that Cory has yet to qualify for the December debate. | | | | Friend, There are only a few hours left until we close the books on our November fundraising, and we haven't reached our $1.5 million end-of-month goal yet. In a minute, I'm going to explain to you why hitting this goal is so important, "=" It's no secret that Cory has yet to qualify for the December debate. We reached the DNC's 200,000 individual donor threshold the morning after his strong debate performance, which was an incredible and exciting moment for our campaign. Now, we need to quickly hit 4% in at least four polls -- or 6% in two polls -- to secure Cory 's spot on the December stage. You may be wondering, why hasn't Cory gotten those polls yet? Well team, I get this question. There are a few headwinds we've been facing. This is Cory's first time running for president, so he didn't enter the race with high name recognition, like some of the frontrunners. He also spent the 2018 election cycle campaigning for candidates in competitive races rather than building his own fundraising list. And hey, let's not forget that this is the most crowded Democratic primary in our country's history -- it can be hard to break out of the pack when we've seen eighteen candidates get into the race. Now let me be clear -- I don't believe it will stay this way. I truly believe there is no candidate better positioned than Cory to beat Donald Trump, heal our country, and achieve justice and opportunity for every American. But it does mean that as an underdog campaign, we need to work harder to break through. We know that the more people hear about Cory, the more they like him. So a few days ago, we launched a series of radio and digital ads to introduce people across the country to our campaign. We plan to reach those who are undecided or who have Cory among their top choices and bring them into our campaign. That's how we'll get the polls to qualify for the December debate, and that's how we'll continue to build this campaign, brick by brick, to take Cory all the way to the White House. "=" Thank you from the bottom of my heart for being a part of this campaign. Matt Matt Klapper Senior Advisor Cory 2020 "=" | | Paid for by Cory 2020 P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved. Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible. If you got this message from a friend, "" This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on "", "", and "". It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe "". Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info "".

name: Michael Bennet
subject: I owe you an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friend: [In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a $29 donation to my campaign, but you should know why first.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9aa/134673f2/9d6d113/6997b835/4274150225/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_113019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

I crunched the numbers with my finance team, and we're short of our goal this month.

[We've launched ads, opened new offices, and hired field staff, but we need to raise another $20,000 before midnight TONIGHT if we're going to reach our fundraising goal and keep building at the pace we need to win!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9aa/134673f2/9d6d113/6997b835/4274150225/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_113019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

While other candidates are starting to burn out after months or even years in the spotlight, I'm just getting started.

Since I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, every step I take in this journey is because grassroots supporters like you are with me, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race.

[The average online donation to my campaign is $29, but any amount you donate today will help us reach this crucial goal. Friend, I'm asking, will you chip in today? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9aa/134673f2/9d6d113/6997b835/4274150225/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_113019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9aa/134673f2/9d6d113/6997b9ca/4274150225/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_113019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9aa/134673f2/9d6d113/6997b9c9/4274150225/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_113019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
I know this is a big goal to hit, team.

But if we reach it, we keep funding ads, hiring new organizers, and building our movement to reach out to the 70% of Democrats who haven't made up their mind yet about who they are supporting in this primary.

[We will win this election the same way we always have: by presenting a compelling and unifying vision for our country.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9aa/134673f2/9d6d113/6997b835/4274150225/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_113019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[I'm counting on this team to step up and help us hit our goal by midnight. I know we can do it. Can you chip in $29 (or whatever you can) right now?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9aa/134673f2/9d6d113/6997b835/4274150225/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_113019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Michael

body:
I’m writing you a really quick email en-route to a campaign strategy meeting. I’ll be brief! When I emailed you a few days ago about my campaign’s En Peter, I’m writing you a really quick email en-route to a campaign strategy meeting. I’ll be brief! When I emailed you a few days ago about my campaign’s End of Month fundraising goal, I mentioned that we were $5,125 short of our goal. Now, we’re still short, but we’re within striking distance. **If just everyone reading this email chipped in any amount above $10 RIGHT NOW, we’d beat our goal handily. Can I count on you to do your part?** [ **END OF MONTH FUND: $10** ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=ffd1eedeacf340a7af885e6dded2801a&_e=LTDmyn06LzK4w0ujHQ70rUJiAL13gj0FwlqSF5fKCnHSSD9-PRuIiflMdwNpubxoSC3zPMUB01T1RstplIuu8DIUydN0aoXYEnmi1zmZwgJmpS75N2kHhGcxaDD8SSgJCpC9nZhhigzAhJTc65psjibc4rEvSAa_KXEe4yrBNhDRE_A9NmE0Yq020fyr3aWbt1R57KnVc_GHV2v_-yFZ5k09ne9ATkFxDLw7X4dyKMu7UgxEmQW1qZbTrTKkgcN2BmTTVgVp0VKbCUUJD4i8L4UIdDJlC-4XiPl-xBAzID1zWNCxTznDRZGHvjRMSO2PJUIVareWMxEUakSulXhy-B5Ng8Vwg8ukHM84PgiOZr_vTLgteU9f1oh5gGEeVzhTom6P_7lTWAXvpScB0r5PvmGkvoMepIWsFFMWUSqizOL2OL4_HVD0GBbgPwjpgbDQ0dLfiT5bWQRsPUzyvrVlNA%3D%3D) I want to walk into this campaign strategy meeting today and tell my team that you made all the difference... that you helped us meet our goal. There’s so much at stake, Peter, and we’re running out of time. **[Can you chip in anything you can right now?](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=ffd1eedeacf340a7af885e6dded2801a&_e=LTDmyn06LzK4w0ujHQ70rUJiAL13gj0FwlqSF5fKCnHSSD9-PRuIiflMdwNpubxoSC3zPMUB01T1RstplIuu8P1QwErHc5Vw5ntGKU-oh-UNg3XL2EMpdM2zYvtTxnZ2VEpPBBlS0CkmZiHXSrLSfzcDACXIOtF9DY7HlmZx8Y9ZZ1hHRN8a8Zv0DSfcTSTqFnH4l1CHT4sfbRDvxjRFDcmI26kI-ad4LFhB2ZKjYkGfB31tW4NVb2zSQcPnEOgIdmvbeyBO5h6wigD5DqAxKAa_zUMmV1ZeyA41B3V4jM4SSxOELLBi__x7r6kIaCAWrzol8TMQXhIjmZcuCUYUUEP61KUEfYojIbtLoNarN1Dn31Ko4jvDm7XSofmQve7WW18-tnwDc2NkjLiEeOZCrxa-pCkLw_fgyYCwkBa3vwSw5rTtYkBsOeQvM6PWzxl5kK5u7JBthqKRqaKWr78LzA%3D%3D)** – Lisa Scheller Candidate for Congress \-------Forwarded Message Below-------- Peter, When I launched my campaign for Congress just over a month ago, I did so with the goal of speaking to as many Lehigh Valley residents as possible. I want to get my message of hope, common sense, and conservatism to everyone – I want as many Pennsylvanians on board our campaign as possible. Of course, I want to gather as many supporters for my campaign as possible, but to be honest, Peter, this fight is much bigger than myself... ** ** **[Right now in Congress, the Democratic House majority would rather play political games than legislate – and when they do get to work, they do so without any regard for working families.](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=ffd1eedeacf340a7af885e6dded2801a&_e=LTDmyn06LzK4w0ujHQ70rUJiAL13gj0FwlqSF5fKCnHSSD9-PRuIiflMdwNpubxoSC3zPMUB01T1RstplIuu8P1QwErHc5Vw5ntGKU-oh-UNg3XL2EMpdM2zYvtTxnZ2VEpPBBlS0CkmZiHXSrLSfzcDACXIOtF9DY7HlmZx8Y9ZZ1hHRN8a8Zv0DSfcTSTqFnH4l1CHT4sfbRDvxjRFDQzB0P47C8qrQyeq2uHtpdVchybXwmFAvsF87oP0Vv21B9JpRdfM3pE1SDyPnMF_eYlQzr3Bo8nO4TzmEVvLOHKrrX9NtApohfJAJG84fwic9rIv3g4weDZjce0wQ2e3pxGQbX5xzIPFbLjGER4lfIP9XXqBfqAnDPnOBkcF2CFvrnImHD-1n6iNgFtNcX66SVFzmRvZHKvTkmGeckRNdl1utpiskqyM4tkOlZc2z54pqIZiF6Evwj-JrmrjLRHYKQ%3D%3D)** ❌ They’d rather spend $32 trillion on Medicare for All than lower our taxes ❌ They’d rather promote their ultra-liberal agenda than respect our family values ❌ They’d rather tax American businesses out of success than create good jobs **This fight is about breaking down that Dem majority** – but I can’t do it alone. Peter, I need you in this fight with me. Right now, I’m $5,125 short of my End of Month goal for November. I’m counting on support of patriots like you to help BEAT the radical liberal agenda. **[Will you chip in anything you can to help?](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=ffd1eedeacf340a7af885e6dded2801a&_e=LTDmyn06LzK4w0ujHQ70rUJiAL13gj0FwlqSF5fKCnHSSD9-PRuIiflMdwNpubxoSC3zPMUB01T1RstplIuu8P1QwErHc5Vw5ntGKU-oh-UNg3XL2EMpdM2zYvtTxnZ2VEpPBBlS0CkmZiHXSrLSfzcDACXIOtF9DY7HlmZx8Y9ZZ1hHRN8a8Zv0DSfcTSTqFnH4l1CHT4sfbRDvxjRFDXqXreRrsigOBN5dUAdLQq1XCO4MGZHSLLGprNMn_eNMSbaJiJMdxiocVGogK56RzIW_4WQuJIeaIHzxIn_zY9p63zPW7M4ZN0EoJdlSwwtw5h1palBx4YIgmG-jquoosHUWmEKipj1FPt_cH62v6uB0g1OUpklXsSuAUKRhBmASF6m0krczce0FE4B180pze_qcLdJJ0l7ygMKEHdpYn0hBz2moUM_RdRulmybFRmM7VSaLFFNfk4x0qSZFAy_b2A%3D%3D)** [ **CHIP IN $40 >>** ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=ffd1eedeacf340a7af885e6dded2801a&_e=LTDmyn06LzK4w0ujHQ70rUJiAL13gj0FwlqSF5fKCnHSSD9-PRuIiflMdwNpubxoSC3zPMUB01T1RstplIuu8LJ-oqKHE-hTOJ_KzkWUp0pwaRghyAXUefWFtxmoUuRGk1v7ekFsRPC70IB4fZlUzGjVuwxtXlWHKEgoIFZA7fFR20ULMiwX5u9EEhtk_bkWl0MYsrjA9g4OYuSxhnVX2fGd3Vy4zxaP0bv_zgZiTvmODVpUKMGoZqhe0uQr8b6hUf1ojFtOEBzcaiFGmkwfWf5dkCwJ3IUzLVJ0HWNcJ_NT8fhe7-VI1TtO_DtrmlhBUptLTPpeHroi54Jj6sdLDO_CrdegfFGMDsTf0DGHFBcRiDVDN4SOwr0yKLzmA7PGNRkFQjP2r4FilhilxwCAh_E-vI7gG-g5uwc6eG0vCKD1TMNWT4CIib2_NmZ0GmcAbGodllJQ9npEzOiAHcMLpg%3D%3D) [ **CHIP IN $55 >>** ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=ffd1eedeacf340a7af885e6dded2801a&_e=LTDmyn06LzK4w0ujHQ70rUJiAL13gj0FwlqSF5fKCnHSSD9-PRuIiflMdwNpubxoSC3zPMUB01T1RstplIuu8Mrlrws9i5uCektxfTJiDPox3d-v6Y69E9JxVyGG2SCWzD5LA0GqfBpAEiYi4hoYGWo2uIRpsLRzmeNzCyIPpKH5a9KolAUDEDxN25Hv2EQyFtLyXBodkH7_d2lhO3lGs-CQRwae77S5DANNTt9gFt7FzcbRADPSaZh9ygIN9yNdrXxh_uJ0i_SWbawNQ77LnHWbUTANHd8PaQBWcTgiPxKn3OB5eOa3FGS5r1fJg9250zZrbkqOErw3ro15_Qmro0BvdmooHyvCTesoZ4Yetu9bDqUijqEvbFIBLrTb_hJgB8H3JComleSRIu0JtsRi-Zb8GFXLDDcyfA-BjsDLOMgJExhvic5JS8CCQf7HyGQ1m2gMYVeBBb8Vvxl3r2xiYQ%3D%3D) The national Democrats see our Pennsylvania district as a must-win in 2020 to grow their House majority. They think that if they can beat me, they’ll be able to grow their control of Congress by a wide margin. **[I need your help to make sure they can’t do that, Peter.](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=ffd1eedeacf340a7af885e6dded2801a&_e=LTDmyn06LzK4w0ujHQ70rUJiAL13gj0FwlqSF5fKCnHSSD9-PRuIiflMdwNpubxoSC3zPMUB01T1RstplIuu8P1QwErHc5Vw5ntGKU-oh-UNg3XL2EMpdM2zYvtTxnZ2VEpPBBlS0CkmZiHXSrLSfzcDACXIOtF9DY7HlmZx8Y9ZZ1hHRN8a8Zv0DSfcTSTqFnH4l1CHT4sfbRDvxjRFDelR4t3unxTCrAnpcYRc-onvT1DzPvbXErDqEhDsDFcWioR13Djw98BeLtz-XkxeEwHBdtGm55c8I6WzIS21krC9LCEZMFySY6GNFywUtgGhF7P4Hqtp8WsWzeHfGbXoROCaBZLJRSIjV-Meo8Qff4YNxnvOPGE2I2byhHIy5Y4aEiSGPWx7OB3nahc4vpEAeluNdrGXJ-ErvfINsKYlVDKpYKl4YddR3LWEvdgL223eQK17piIIpplVSn2XyzKsuA%3D%3D)** With so little time before our numbers go public for this month, we need to move quickly. I want to make sure that when Pelosi and Schiff’s Democrats check in on our November numbers, they see a wave of support. We can win this – I need your help now. When I emailed you a few days ago about my campaign’s End of Month fundraising goal, I mentioned that we were $5,125 short of our goal. Now, we’re still short, but we’re within striking distance. If just everyone reading this email chipped in any amount above $10 RIGHT NOW, we’d beat our goal handily. Can I count on you to do your part? I want to walk into this campaign strategy meeting today and tell my team that you made all the difference... that you helped us meet our goal. There’s so much at stake, Peter, and we’re running out of time. – Lisa Scheller Candidate for Congress \-------Forwarded Message Below-------- Peter, When I launched my campaign for Congress just over a month ago, I did so with the goal of speaking to as many Lehigh Valley residents as possible. I want to get my message of hope, common sense, and conservatism to everyone – I want as many Pennsylvanians on board our campaign as possible. Of course, I want to gather as many supporters for my campaign as possible, but to be honest, Peter, this fight is much bigger than myself... ❌ They’d rather spend $32 trillion on Medicare for All than lower our taxes ❌ They’d rather promote their ultra-liberal agenda than respect our family values ❌ They’d rather tax American businesses out of success than create good jobs This fight is about breaking down that Dem majority – but I can’t do it alone. Peter, I need you in this fight with me. Right now, I’m $5,125 short of my End of Month goal for November. I’m counting on support of patriots like you to help BEAT the radical liberal agenda. The national Democrats see our Pennsylvania district as a must-win in 2020 to grow their House majority. They think that if they can beat me, they’ll be able to grow their control of Congress by a wide margin. With so little time before our numbers go public for this month, we need to move quickly. I want to make sure that when Pelosi and Schiff’s Democrats check in on our November numbers, they see a wave of support. We can win this – I need your help now. Lisa Scheller Candidate for Congress PAID FOR BY LISA SCHELLER FOR CONGRESS

Dear Supporter,
Midnight tonight is fast approaching and it marks the end of November. I need your help to reach our month-ending fundraising goal. This fundraising is critical as I prepare to officially launch my US Senate campaign. Thank you for your donation by the deadline TONIGHT.

Our campaign for the US Senate has earned and maintains front-runner status because of you! Your continued support and inspiration are greatly appreciated as I file my candidacy. I am excited to be filing at 12pm on Monday, December 2nd at the State Board of Elections office located at 430 North Salisbury Street in Raleigh, North Carolina.

Thank you for donating by tonight's deadline, your support of our campaign, and for inspiring me to be "One of Us for All of US!"

| Team:

We're up against our final November deadline, and right now, we're only 86% of the way to raising our $30,000 goal, and we only have until midnight to close the gap.

_**[Will you chip in $27 or more to stand with Ed Markey? If we fall short of our goals now, we could fall short of victory in the primary. | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ee/3eb3e2fc/687d3b1e/744d2580/3437484894/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191130_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191130_em_fr_b2_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ee/3eb3e2fc/687d3b1e/744d258f/3437484894/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191130_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191130_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ee/3eb3e2fc/687d3b1e/744d258e/3437484894/VEsHAA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=20191130_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191130_em_fr_b2_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Mark Warner
subject: Thank you for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We're up against tough opposition from the Trump campaign, which is headquartered in Virginia and is investing heavily throughout the Commonwealth.
---
| | Hi Derek,

I hope you had a great Thanksgiving and some time off with family. I know Lisa and our daughters and I had a great time being together after a pretty hectic couple of months that certainly have kept me busy.

I know my team already emailed today, but I just wanted to send a note thanking you for your support. We're heading into the most important campaign I've ever run, and I've frankly never seen before the kind of energy that I've seen among Virginia Democrats as I've traveled around Virginia these past few months. That gives me hope for 2020 -- hope that we can build on the victories we celebrated earlier this month and hope that we can beat Donald Trump and start to turn our country around under a Democratic president and Democratic majorities in Congress.

I'm thankful that people care enough about what's happening in their communities to get out there and make a difference. Whether it's voting, volunteering, talking to friends and family, or supporting campaigns like mine... this is how we make real change in a democracy like ours.

And I'm particularly thankful for folks like you, who've made a point to stay updated on my campaign and support it financially when they can. That means a great deal to me, and I can't thank you enough.

I haven't checked exactly how many percentage points behind we are on our November fundraising goal at this point, but I'll just say this: If you're able to help me out as we build this campaign and head into 2020, I'd be incredibly grateful. Your continued support is how we'll win in 2020, and it's what keeps me going as we head into this tough campaign.

clean_body: We're up against tough opposition from the Trump campaign, which is headquartered in Virginia and is investing heavily throughout the Commonwealth. | | Hi Derek, I hope you had a great Thanksgiving and some time off with family. I know Lisa and our daughters and I had a great time being together after a pretty hectic couple of months that certainly have kept me busy. I know my team already emailed today, but I just wanted to send a note thanking you for your support. We're heading into the most important campaign I've ever run, and I've frankly never seen before the kind of energy that I've seen among Virginia Democrats as I've traveled around Virginia these past few months. That gives me hope for 2020 -- hope that we can build on the victories we celebrated earlier this month and hope that we can beat Donald Trump and start to turn our country around under a Democratic president and Democratic majorities in Congress. I'm thankful that people care enough about what's happening in their communities to get out there and make a difference. Whether it's voting, volunteering, talking to friends and family, or supporting campaigns like mine... this is how we make real change in a democracy like ours. And I'm particularly thankful for folks like you, who've made a point to stay updated on my campaign and support it financially when they can. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Devin Nunes, Trump's "Great American Hero," has other plans for the impeachment inquiry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Devin Nunes, the ranking GOP member on the House Intelligence Committee, is on the warpath to derail the impeachment inquiry: He tried to force the identity of the whistleblower out of Lt. Col. Alexander Vindman during his questioning, disregarding the fact that whistleblowers are protected under federal law and Trump is causing an ongoing threat to their safety, labelling them a spy and suggesting the death penalty. He's pushed debunked conspiracy theories that come right out of the Kremlin. He compared the investigation to a cult twice and accused congressional Democrats of trying to obtain nude photos of the president. When Congress reconvenes to debate impeachment, we know Devin Nunes will lead the charge to distract and mislead the American people, so we need to hear what voters like you think NOW: **Do you approve of Devin Nunes 's attempts to derail the impeachment inquiry?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdce3/6e9863e8/16cfdf73/1db0a34c/2172902484/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/pjOftSEb") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdce3/6e9863e8/16cfdf73/1db0a34c/2172902484/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/pjOftSEb") Thank you in advance for your feedback \-- we couldn't do this work without you, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdce3/6e9863e8/16cfdf73/1db0a353/2172902484/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191130c.ND-b&refcode2=PiBpOuW8WEu4pssYLU55")

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: After just a few months in this race, Cook Political Report ranked us a "toss-up." Now, a recent poll shows a Democrat up by three points!
body:
We can do it!
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f80/4bef7a87/6b8f4e42/287ffb04/793436472/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

We KNOW we can defeat Susan Collins. Here's why:
* **We 're gaining ground fast:** After just a few months in this race, _Cook Political Report_ ranked us a "toss-up." Now, a recent poll shows a Democrat up by three points!
* **Maine is poised to flip:** Collins' approval ratings are at an all-time low. Mainers are clearly ready for a Senator who puts their needs first in Washington.
* **We have you:** Our campaign has received over 100,000 grassroots online contributions. That's important because Sara can't win this race alone.

Momentum is clearly on our side, but we have to keep pushing every single day if we want to win. So what do you say?
[**Make your first online contribution before our deadline tonight. We need your help in order to hit our $150,000 end-of-month goal!**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f80/4bef7a87/6b8f4e42/287ffb1b/793436472/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMzAtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november-eom?refcode=em191130-2-full")
Together, we are proving that we have what it takes to defeat Susan Collins and flip the U.S. Senate for Democrats. Thank you for being a part of that.
All our best,
\- Team Sara

name: Monika Johnson-Hostler
subject: Final message
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS
body:
Will you act without fear?

| [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d92c/7dfbb003/42afc9a7/5527be53/1923075366/VEsH/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191130_em_lasteom&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=rtw_20191130_em_lasteom&source=rtw_20191130_em_lasteom")
---
**It 's true--this is the last message you'll get from my team or me today, friend. But before you click away, I want to tell you again why I am running in this race.**

I'm not running as a career politician, or because I aspire to be one.

I'm not running because the timing is "right"--because timing never feels right, to _anyone_ , for anything.

**I'm running because I've sat where you are, where many people in this district have, and felt like my representative did not represent me, my family, or what is in the best interest of the Second District.**

I'm not going to stop fighting for this district. I'm ready to go to work for you in Washington, if you'll let me.

I need you to act without fear today. **[If you believe in our vision, will you make a final donation before our End-of-Month deadline at midnight?](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d92c/7dfbb003/42afc9a7/5527be50/1923075366/VEsE/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191130_em_lasteom&recurring=auto&refcode2=CTA2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=2+-+If+you+believe+in+our+vision+will+you+ma&utm_campaign=rtw_20191130_em_lasteom&source=rtw_20191130_em_lasteom")** [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d92c/7dfbb003/42afc9a7/5527be51/1923075366/VEsF/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191130_em_lasteom&recurring=auto&refcode2=CTA2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=rtw_20191130_em_lasteom&source=rtw_20191130_em_lasteom")[I'LL DONATE!](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d92c/7dfbb003/42afc9a7/5527be56/1923075366/VEsC/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191130_em_lasteom&recurring=auto&refcode2=biobox&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=4+-+ILL+DONATE&utm_campaign=rtw_20191130_em_lasteom&source=rtw_20191130_em_lasteom") Thank you for everything.

name: Cory Booker
subject: Hey there, did you see this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
I'm excited about these new tools that will help us reach voters where they are and help show them why the time to join our team is now.
| | |
---
| Friend, There are only a few weeks left to meet the DNC's polling threshold to secure my spot on the December debate stage. That's why this past week, our campaign launched our first paid advertisements on radio and digital persuasion ads -- and we hope to place our first television ad buys in a few of the early states soon, too. I'm excited about these new tools that will help us reach voters where they are and help show them why the time to join our team is now. Here's a link to help us do it: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191130_CB_20191130-fr-CB-pollingbump-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks,
Cory _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ Hey there, Emily here, Cory's Chief Innovation Officer. It's my job to make sure our campaign is being as innovative as possible with our resources. Right now, our team is focusing on making sure Cory qualifies for the December debate. A few days ago we hit the donor threshold, now we need to get the polls. **[Will you chip in to help us do it?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191130_CB_20191130-fr-CB-pollingbump-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I don't know about you, but everyone I've talked to recently has asked me the same thing -- _why hasn 't Cory been polling higher?_ I mean, he crushed it on the debate stage last week, we have strong teams on the ground in the early states, and his favorability ratings are consistently some of the highest in the field. So why aren't the polls reflecting that? **Here 's the thing -- Cory is in a lot of folks' top two picks for president. People like Cory, but just like many voters around the country, they just aren't quite ready to commit themselves fully to any candidate yet.** But not to worry, we have a plan to start threading the needle. We know that **the more people hear about Cory, the more they like him** \-- _which is especially important to note when a recent poll found that even though only around 6% of folks say they 're undecided, 53% of likely Democratic voters who currently have a preferred candidate may change their mind about whom they support._ We're coordinating efforts, based on these findings, to get the polls we need for Cory to qualify for the December debate. We're planning more trips across the country, placing ad buys, and hiring additional staff in key early states to reach these undecided and persuadable folks. Our team is making sure they know who Cory is, what he stands for, and why he is the candidate who can -- and will -- defeat Donald Trump. **[It's time to make moves, team. Will you help us do it by donating today? Anything you can give will help us show these persuadable folks why Cory is the best candidate for president.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191130_CB_20191130-fr-CB-pollingbump-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks for all your help,
Emily Emily Norman
Chief Innovation Officer
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191130_CB_20191130-fr-CB-pollingbump-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dbf/5fca0d19/78b2493c/291ca4e6/2516054235/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dbf/5fca0d19/78b2493c/291ca4e5/2516054235/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dbf/5fca0d19/78b2493c/291ca4e4/2516054235/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dbf/5fca0d19/78b2493c/291ca4e3/2516054235/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dbf/5fca0d19/78b2493c/291ca4e2/2516054235/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dbf/5fca0d19/78b2493c/291ca4e6/2516054235/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

body:

| | Hi First off, I hope you're having a great holiday weekend. I've had a few much-appreciated days at home with the kids. I've spent a good number of hours on the floor with Ellie, coloring and discussing the relative merits of mammals versus reptiles. James and I spent a lot of time with our noses in books, wishing the moon goodnight, saying "I think I can," and finding Waldo (every time!). I'm going to take one more day to sleep off the turkey, and on Monday I'll head back out to keep spreading our message and building our movement. We've got just about six hours left until our end of month fundraising deadline. **[Please chip in to start us off strong!](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639097d/55b66746/2d46e3f1/80f1a79/2161868818/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-11-30-iphone&recurring=1&amount=3")** Fired up and (almost) ready to go, _Joe_ Sent from my iPhone |

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Last time I'll reach out about this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Every dollar you donate before midnight is being matched -- that means that your donation will go twice as far.

---
| |
I've had a great holiday weekend with my family, and I hope you have too. Before it's over, I wanted to quickly reach out one more time. Our November deadline is just hours away, and we still haven't quite hit our goal. So I'm asking all of our top supporters: can I count on you to chip in by midnight?

Every dollar you donate before midnight will be matched -- that means that your donation will go **twice as far**. You can use this link so your donation gets matched and counted toward our November goal right away: **[mjfortexas.com/NovemberMatch](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890960/7f51f7bc/4ba3734e/4ef08940/1361526812/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU3NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-novmatch?refcode=email_20191130.3nd__577__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Senator Cornyn's D.C. special interest pals are already pouring millions into this election -- but our campaign has something better: this grassroots team.

Thanks, Peter. Your support is what keeps this campaign going.

\-- MJ

[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890960/7f51f7bc/4ba3734e/4ef08940/1361526812/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU3NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-novmatch?refcode=email_20191130.3nd__577__&amount=10&recurring=true")
