name: Gary
subject: we're falling short
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
\--

| | |
---
Friend - Tonight's the biggest fundraising deadline for our campaign, but we're still $2,768 short of what we need to raise to win.
According to CBS, our race in Michigan will decide Senate control, and last quarter, my right-wing opponent outraised me because Donald Trump and Senate Republicans helped funnel $3 million into Michigan to buy this seat.

But we can do it, friend. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports Democrats can flip the Senate. But we can only do it if we win here in Michigan, and now, a recent poll shows me TIED with my right-wing opponent.
**So with only hours until our biggest end-of-month deadline yet, I'm counting on your immediate support:[Will you rush $3 or more now - whatever you can spare to help us hit this goal - to defend Michigan's Senate seat and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daab2/5721a3ed/71de3f08/efaa70b/774632562/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxNDktZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk149-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
Thank you,

Gary
| [To unsubscribe from the Peters for Michigan email list, please click here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daab2/5721a3ed/71de3f08/efaa70a/774632562/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
Po Box 32072
Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. Join Gary's team and show your support [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daab2/5721a3ed/71de3f08/efaa709/774632562/VEsF/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daab2/5721a3ed/71de3f08/efaa708/774632562/VEsC/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/update-your-info") We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. However, if you'd still like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daab2/5721a3ed/71de3f08/efaa707/774632562/VEsD/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). However, if you'd still like to receive fewer emails, you can click "". If you would like to unsubscribe from our emails, click "" "" |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben_Ray_Luj=C3=A1n?=
subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | This has been one of the most humbling weeks of my life. For the first time in my entire campaign, I was worried we'd fail to meet tonight's monumental goal. **But after generous donors stepped up to MATCH gifts in these final 6 hours --_I 'm now inches from closing my fundraising gap!_ ** [_**I only need 1 more gift from 18326 before midnight to meet my end-of-month goal, have a HISTORIC fundraising comeback, and DEFEAT McConnell 's Republican Senate. Will yours be the gift that puts me over the top? It will be matched until midnight! >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191130_em_fr_b3_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") I can't overstate how critical winning this race is to defeating McConnell's Senate. It's why Trump personally held a rally here to sabotage our chances. It's why Republicans just raised $100,000 SPECIFICALLY to take this seat from us. **Now, more than ever, I would be so humbled to know you have my back in this historic fight.** I hope I can count on your $5 before the deadline in 6 hours. Your generous gift will be matched until midnight tonight. | | ******[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191130_em_fr_b3_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $25 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191130_em_fr_b3_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,50,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $50 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191130_em_fr_b3_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=5,25,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $100 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191130_em_fr_b3_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=5,25,50,250")******
---

******[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191130_em_fr_b3_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******
---

Thank you,

Ben Ray

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7f7/18e32a7f/506b8d81/7b22d313/3064661310/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7f7/18e32a7f/506b8d81/7b22d310/3064661310/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7f7/18e32a7f/506b8d81/7b22d311/3064661310/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7f7/18e32a7f/506b8d81/7b22d316/3064661310/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7f7/18e32a7f/506b8d81/7b22d317/3064661310/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7f7/18e32a7f/506b8d81/7b22d314/3064661310/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben

Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Help us close the gap
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
Our work requires a lot of resources, so we're coming to you directly: |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5b9/34a064cc/1b1fb063/7036483/2692657040/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - This month was huge for the fight to protect the vote. First, voting rights took center stage at the 5th Democratic Presidential debate in Georgia. The day after, several of the candidates joined us for a voter purge phone bank reaching out to voters in danger of losing their right to vote. **But in the same week that we heard our country 's Democratic leaders taking a stand to protect the right to vote, over 300,000 Georgians were at risk of being purged from the voting rolls.** Fair Fight is working to notify voters so they can take the necessary steps to stay on the rolls. But our work takes resources: [**So we 've set a goal of reaching 15,000 individual contributions before the end of the month so we have the resources we need to reach every voter at risk of being purged. Can you chip in today to help Fair Fight ensure that every voter in every state can participate in our elections?**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5b9/34a064cc/1b1fb063/7036480/2692657040/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTMwMTlORU0tMS1hIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE113019NEM-1-a") **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5b9/34a064cc/1b1fb063/7036480/2692657040/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTMwMTlORU0tMS1hIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE113019NEM-1-a")** Georgia is a battleground state, and the state at the center of the fight to protect voting rights. What happens here will determine the roadmap for fighting voter suppression across the country. We're working hard to ensure the right of every eligible Georgian and every eligible American to vote in the 2020 elections. But our work requires a lot of resources, and that means getting small donations from folks across the country. So any amount you can afford to pitch in before our midnight deadline would be greatly appreciated. **You can use this link:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=novemberdeadline](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5b9/34a064cc/1b1fb063/7036480/2692657040/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTMwMTlORU0tMS1hIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE113019NEM-1-a")** Together in the fight, \- Team Fair Fight **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5b9/34a064cc/1b1fb063/7036480/2692657040/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTMwMTlORU0tMS1hIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE113019NEM-1-a")**

name: Nikki (personal)
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Congress
body:
---
| | I know the end of the month brings a lot of fundraising appeals into your inbox. While emails like this might not be your favorite to read, they are important. I'm running on principle -- I think that it should be easier for everyday Americans to get ahead, and I think serving your country is more about the people you help than the money you pocket for re-election. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - I know the end of the month brings a lot of fundraising appeals into your inbox. While emails like this might not be your favorite to read, they are important. **I 'm running on principle** \-- I think that it should be easier for everyday Americans to get ahead, and I think serving your country is more about the people you help than the money you pocket for re-election. I'm rejecting corporate PAC money. I refuse to be beholden to the most wealthy Americans -- they already have enough influence on our political system. **That 's where emails like this come in.** Since I'm not taking big corporate checks, I'm relying 100% on grassroots support from people like you. [_**So I 'm hoping that before you close this email and go about your evening, you'll consider chipping into my campaign ahead of our end of month deadline. We only have $1,098 left to hit our goal, and we could use your help.**_](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_noveom?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191130_EOM6_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+So+Irsquom+hoping+that+before+you+close+&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191130_EOM6_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191130_EOM6_U1_X1") Thank you, Nikki
---

#
I’m crunching the numbers right now, and it looks like we’re going to fall short of our November fundraising goal. We’re almost there but need to raise an additional $1,487 to hit our target.

**I’m personally asking you to help us get there by chipping in whatever you can afford. Your investment in our campaign can make all the difference here.**

[**Please, chip in any amount BEFORE 11:59 PM while our emergency 3X Match is still in effect.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=db23692ffd&e=02cd889ad3)

David Perdue

Sent from my iPhone

\---------- Original message ----------
From: **David Perdue** <[info@perdueforsenate.com](mailto:bonnie@perduesenate.com)>
Date: Saturday, November 30th, 2019
Subject: Running out of time

This month, radical Democrats took direct aim at Georgia.

Every Democrat running for President came here. Our opponents announced they raised over $2 MILLION to spend attacking me. _And Georgia was named one of the 10 most vulnerable Republican states in the country._

We MUST respond, before this gets out of control. [**Our emergency TRIPLE MATCH is still in effect until 11:59 PM. Can you please rush a donation now before our November fundraising deadline?**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=abb7ebace0&e=02cd889ad3)

---
| Georgia will decide who controls the White House and Senate in 2020. President Trump is counting on you to defend this Senate seat and protect the Republican majority. So am I, and we simply can’t wait until 2020.

This TRIPLE MATCH is a powerful opportunity to maximize your impact. Chipping in any amount will help us respond to the Left’s false attacks. It will help ensure we are not outraised by our opponents. It will help us head into 2020 with the grassroots momentum we need to WIN.

[**Please, pitch in ANY AMOUNT before 11:59 PM to triple your impact. I’m really counting on you for this one.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=c95f0bacb4&e=02cd889ad3)

Thank you.
David Perdue
